title: Solutions Architect
description:
Lead Data Engineer / Solutions Architect
 



**Stockholm (Hybrid)** 




  





**Permanent | Senior Level | Product & Consulting Hybrid** 




*Build the data foundations that make AI actually work* 




  





 Everyone talks about AI.
 



 Few organisations have the data foundations to support it.
 



  





 We’re a Stockholm-based product company operating at the intersection of data platforms, analytics, and modern consultancy. Our mission is simple but ambitious: make advanced analytics and AI achievable, sustainable, and efficient - without the endless manual work that slows most data initiatives down.
 



  





 We’re now looking for a
 **Lead Data Engineer / Solutions Architect** 
 to help us scale both our product and our customer impact.
 



  





 This is a role for someone who wants real technical ownership, enjoys working close to customers, and believes that great architecture beats brute-force delivery.
 



  





 Why this role exists?
 



 We’re growing quickly. Our platform is in production with customers, our consultants are fully booked, and demand is increasing.
 



  





 By bringing in a senior lead, you will:
 


* Step directly into active projects
* Take architectural ownership alongside founders and senior engineers
* Free up time for deeper product innovation
* Help shape how we scale - technically and culturally



  





 This is not a “keep-the-lights-on” role.
 



  





 It’s about building the foundation others depend on.
 



  





 What you’ll work on:
 



 End-to-end data architecture
 



 You’ll design and implement modern, cloud-native data platforms that support:
 


* Business intelligence
* Advanced analytics
* Machine learning and AI use cases



  





 Your solutions must be robust, semantic, and machine-readable - not just visually appealing dashboards.
 



  





 AI-ready data foundations
 



 You’ll apply proven modelling approaches (Kimball, Inmon, Data Vault) and modern architectural patterns (e.g. medallion layers) to ensure:
 


* High data quality
* Strong governance
* Long-term adaptability



  





 Because “garbage in” doesn’t just mean bad reports - it means unreliable AI.
 



  





 Automation first
 



 We believe manual work is a design failure.
 



 You’ll build pipelines and orchestration with automation as the default:
 


* Minimal manual intervention
* High observability
* Reliable, repeatable deployments



  





 Technical leadership
 



 You’ll:
 


* Set standards for architecture, quality, and documentation
* Mentor less experienced engineers
* Act as a bridge between business needs and technical execution



  





 Advisory and trust
 



 You’ll work closely with customers, helping them move from legacy setups to modern platforms - not by selling hours, but by making them faster and more independent.
 



  





 The environment you’ll join
 


* A product company, not a body-shop
* A small, senior, highly collaborative team
* Flat structure, low ego, high trust
* Decisions made close to the code
* Long-term thinking over short-term billing



  





 We combine product development with consulting partnerships because we believe the fastest way to improve analytics is to build better tools - not to maximise hours spent.
 



 This also means you’ll see your ideas:
 


* Shipped
* Used
* Iterated on
* And improved based on real customer feedback



  





 Tech & experience
 



 We care more about capability and judgement than ticking every box, but you’ll likely have:
 



  





 Experience
 


* 5+ years in data engineering, analytics engineering, or data architecture
* Experience designing solutions end-to-end, not just building parts of them



  





 Strong foundations in
 


* Advanced SQL (T-SQL / PL-SQL, optimisation, performance)
* Cloud platforms (Azure preferred, but AWS / Snowflake experience is equally valued)
* Modern BI tools (Power BI, Qlik, Tableau)
* Data warehouse automation and modern architecture patterns



  





 Mindset
 


* You take pride in enabling others through solid foundations
* You care deeply about data quality, lineage, and governance
* You enjoy learning - whether that’s new cloud services, AI integrations, or better architectural patterns
* You prefer elegant systems over quick fixes



  





 Ways of working
 


* Hybrid setup - Stockholm-based, flexible office presence
* Swedish work culture: trust, balance, autonomy, and responsibility
* Six weeks of vacation
* Flexible compensation model (fixed salary available if preferred)
* Guaranteed paid baseline even between assignments
* Opportunity for ownership/shares for long-term engagement



  





 Fluent Swedish is strongly preferred due to customer interaction, but exceptional candidates may be considered even if Swedish isn’t yet perfect.
 



  





 Who thrives here?
 



 This role is ideal if you:
 


* Are tired of over-engineered bureaucracy or under-engineered shortcuts
* Want to influence both product direction and customer outcomes
* Enjoy working in a Nordic, collaborative environment where people help each other
* Want stability
 *and* 
 the energy of a scale-up



  





 Build foundations. Enable intelligence. Ship things that matter.
 



  





 If you believe great AI starts with great data - and that great data starts with thoughtful architecture - this could be the most rewarding role you’ve had in years.

title: Technical Process Safety Specialist
description:
**TECHNICAL PROCESS SAFETY SPECIALIST**
**Location:** 
 Stockholm, SE – with occasional business trips as required.
   

  

**Contract duration:** 
 initial contract until 31/12/2026 - renewable
   

  

**Start Date:** 
 ASAP
   

  

**Project:** 
 Boden - 6 billion EUR green steel project site
   

  

 We are on a mission to disrupt the global steel industry by producing green steel, with the end goal of bringing down CO2 emissions to zero. Our green steel production in Boden will be powered by one of the world’s largest green hydrogen plants, running on renewable electricity. Instead of emitting large amounts of CO?, as in traditional steelmaking processes, our primary emission will be water. By 2030, our ambition is to produce 5 million tonnes of green steel annually in our fully integrated, digitalized, and sustainable plant in Boden, located in northern Sweden - currently in construction phase. The facility will impact, and shape, the surroundings as well as the perception of Boden, with the aim that it will be seen as a symbol for the much-needed green transition of heavy industry.
   

  

**Technical Process Safety Specialist**
 As a Technical Process Safety Specialist for the Boden project, your role is critical in supporting the safe and compliant design and operation of the project’s assets. You contribute with expertise to ensure that all facilities are designed with a strong focus on safety, minimizing risks to staff, contractors, and the surrounding community. This involves close collaboration with design & engineering consultants & contractors and equipment vendors to review and validate safety aspects of the design. You will contribute to the development and application of safety standards for the project, aligned with applicable regulatory requirements and industry best practices. Technical Process Safety Specialist will report to Technical Process Safety Lead under the Central Engineering Department Organization. This position is based at Stockholm HQ, and the candidate should be flexible to work and travel to Boden project site as required.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Supporting Design Safety: Contribute to ensuring that the design of all project facilities prioritizes safety and minimizes risks. This includes reviewing and validating safety aspects together with engineering contractors and equipment vendors.
* Applying Safety Standards: Support the development, interpretation, and implementation of safety standards based on regulatory requirements and industry best practices. Ensure that these standards are consistently applied across the project.
* Regulatory Requirements Analysis: Collaborate with regulatory bodies and third-party specialists to identify and understand relevant regulatory requirements. Stay updated on applicable regulations and support interpretation of their impact on the project.
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with engineering teams, contractors, vendors, and regulatory bodies to ensure alignment on safety requirements. Contribute to effective communication of safety-related information and support resolution of compliance-related questions.
* Supporting Compliance Activities: Contribute to ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements and safety standards by participating in monitoring, reviews, inspections, and audits as needed.
* By contributing with technical expertise in these areas, you support the delivery of a safe and legally compliant asset that protects the well-being of workers and the surrounding community.


**Qualifications**
* Engineering degree, MSc, in a relevant discipline, with preference to Chemical Engineering Background
* At least ten years’ experience in large-scale industrial projects (50 MUSD+) and/or site experience (steel mill, mining, paper mill, utilities generation, LNG, Hydrogen, Oil & Gas, petrochemicals, refinery etc.), with a minimum of five years in a technical process safety-related role. Steel Plant experience will have the advantage.
* Experience in HAZID, HAZOP, LOPA, SIL, QRA, Risk Assessments, Functional Safety, BAT, Occupational Safety, Hazards, Fire Safety, ATEX, Hazardous Area Classification and Effects Management
* Additional experience of Noise Study, Consequence Analysis, Action Error Analysis, Interface Assessment, Machine Safety will be an advantage
* Experience with hydrogen systems / LNG / metal industry in major projects is a strong advantage.
* Knowledge of relevant Swedish / European / EU / international standards, laws, and regulations related to technical process safety and industrial safety is required.
* Knowledge of relevant permitting systems and consent-to-operate processes for major industrial plants is required.
* Having knowledge of Swedish language will be an added advantage.

title: Digital Workplace Engineer
description:
Vill du arbeta med och vidareutveckla moderna digitala arbetsplatser hos en av Sveriges mest samhällsviktiga aktörer?
   

  

 I denna roll får du möjlighet att arbeta i en senior och ansvarstagande position inom Digital Workplace, där virtuella klientplattformar är en central del. Du blir en nyckelperson i arbetet med att förvalta, utveckla och framtidssäkra organisationens virtuella arbetsplatser och applikationsleveranser, med starkt fokus på användarupplevelse, stabilitet och säkerhet.
   

  

 Rollen är tekniskt hands-on och kombinerar daglig drift och vidareutveckling av befintliga lösningar med planering och design av framtida plattformar.
   

  

****Om rollen:****
 Som Digital Workplace Engineer med fokus på virtuella klientplattformar arbetar du nära både teknik, verksamhet och användarrepresentanter. Du fångar upp behov, omsätter dem till tekniska lösningar och är med och driver utvecklingen av organisationens digitala arbetsplatser framåt.
   

  

 Tyngdpunkten i rollen ligger på virtuella klientplattformar, där Citrix och VMware/Omnissa Horizon utgör kärnan. Samtidigt är du delaktig i helheten kring den digitala arbetsplatsen, inklusive klienthantering och integrationer mot Microsofts ekosystem.
   

  

****Du arbetar bland annat med:****
* Förvaltning och vidareutveckling av Citrix-baserade virtuella klientmiljöer
* Design och utveckling av VMware/Omnissa Horizon-baserade lösningar
* Virtuella klienter, applikationspaketering och tillhörande infrastruktur
* Automatisering och förbättring av arbetssätt i en DevOps-nära funktion


****Ansvarsområden:****
* Säkerställa stabila, säkra och användarvänliga virtuella arbetsplatser, till exempel genom patchning och livscykelhantering av den tekniska miljön
* Fånga upp användarbehov och omsätta dem till hållbara tekniska lösningar
* Arbeta med automatisering och script för effektivare drift och förvaltning
* Samverka med interna team, användarrepresentanter och externa leverantörer
* Bidra till strategiska vägval och långsiktig plattformsutveckling


****Din profil****
 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av virtuella klientmiljöer och som trivs i gränslandet mellan teknik, användare och utveckling.
   

  

****Vi ser att du har:****
* Erfarenhet av Citrix Workspace / Citrix Virtual Apps & Desktops
* Erfarenhet av VMware / Omnissa Horizon
* God förståelse för virtuella klientplattformar och applikationsleverans
* Erfarenhet av SCCM, Tanium eller liknande verktyg
* Script- och utvecklingsvana (PowerShell, Bash, Python)


**Meriterande:**
* Vana av att arbeta med lösningsdesign och tekniska helhetslösningar
* Erfarenhet av DevOps-arbetssätt eller automatisering


****Personliga egenskaper****
 Du är lösningsorienterad, analytisk och tekniskt nyfiken.
   

  

 Du tar ansvar, arbetar strukturerat och trivs i samarbete med både teknik- och verksamhetsnära roller. Du har förmåga att se helheten utan att tappa detaljfokus.
   

  

****Detta erbjuds i rollen.****
* En central roll inom ett strategiskt och samhällsviktigt område
* Möjlighet att påverka teknikval, arkitektur och arbetssätt
* Hands-on arbete i moderna Citrix- och Horizon-miljöer
* Ett kompetent team med hög teknisk nivå och stark samarbetskultur
* Långsiktighet, stabilitet och fokus på kvalitet och säkerhet


****Varför den här rollen?****
* Möjlighet att arbeta i ett av Sveriges mest omfattande och strategiskt viktiga IT-initiativ
* Bygga en modern, säker och skalerbar plattform från grunden
* Jobba långsiktigt och tekniskt djupt i en miljö som värdesätter innovation, kvalitet och samarbete
* Ta en central roll i ett kompetent team där din expertis verkligen gör skillnad


 Tjänsten gäller en långsiktig anställning hos kunden.
   

  

 Är du redo för nästa utmaning? Skicka in din ansökan så återkommer vi med mer information om nästa steg.

title: CATEGORY MANAGER IT
description:
Category Manager IT
   

  

 Are you someone who thrives on structure and enjoys being at the heart of operations? Do you have the skill for connecting the dots and making things happen? If so, the Category Manager IT role might be the perfect fit for you!
   

  

 Set into a role as Category Manager IT where you are an integral member of the dedicated IT Procurement team within SAS Procurement organization.
   

  

 In the role as Category Manager IT, you will be responsible shaping sourcing decisions across the wider IT landscape, in close collaboration with fellow IT Category Managers to ensure alignment, synergies and a consistent sourcing approach across all IT categories.
   

  

 Beyond strategy and long‑term planning, the role also involves hands‑on, operational procurement work; from managing day‑to‑day supplier interactions and supporting ongoing purchasing needs to ensuring smooth execution of processes and resolving operational issues as they arise. This combination ensures you stay close to the business, the stakeholders and the realities of the IT environment.
   

  

 Challenges you will work on
   

  

 In this exciting and dynamic role, you will oversee a primary IT category, ensuring that strategy, sourcing decisions and supplier relationships create long‑term value. You will tackle the intricate task of balancing category ownership with the flexibility to support additional IT categories, all while operating in a rapidly evolving and fast‑moving industry.
   

  

 As the main point of contact for your category, you will coordinate with cross‑functional stakeholders. Your ability to collaborate with internal and external stakeholders will be crucial.
   

  

 The Team
   

  

 You will be part of a high-performing team composed of talented professionals from various backgrounds. Our team values collaboration, innovation, and a commitment to excellence. We support each other and thrive on creating a positive and inclusive work environment where everyone can succeed.
   

  

 To be successful, we believe you have
   

  

* The ability to work in a structured, organized and proactive way, even in a fast‑moving environment
* A solid understanding of IT procurement, sourcing strategies, supplier management, contract governance and SLAs, and how to apply these effectively in the role
* 8 + years proven experience taking responsibility for IT sourcing projects, RFI/RFP processes, contract negotiations and category strategies, with a strong track record of seeing initiatives through to completion
* The ability to work effectively with cross‑functional teams, building strong relationships and contributing to shared goals
* Confidence in making decisions related to supplier selection, negotiation strategies, category prioritization and sourcing recommendations, and taking ownership of outcomes
* A positive and growth‑oriented mindset, with a commitment to learning, continuous improvement, feedback and collaborative ways of working
* Strong skills in strategic negotiations, stakeholder management, analytical problem‑solving and contract management
* A Master’s degree in IT, business, finance or supply chain — or equivalent relevant professional experience
* A commitment to working from the office four days per week


 Why SAS?
   

  

**Benefits**
 At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:
   

  

* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.
* Work Environment: Our office location in Frösundavik offers a vibrant workspace with a restaurant, café, and easy access to outdoor activities in Hagaparken and Brunnsviken. Engage in running, tennis, outdoor gym sessions, kayaking, and stand-up paddling with equipment available free of charge.
* Convenient Commute: Benefit from a non-stop bus service connecting our office to Solna station, and commuter trains, alongside a network of cycle paths.


 Our Culture at SAS
   

  

 At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. Join us at SAS and be part of shaping the future of aviation!
   

  

 Additional information
   

  

* Deadline for application: 30/04/2026. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
* Position: Fulltime (100%) starting with a 6-month probation period
* This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm), and you will be expected to work onsite. Remote work may also be an option, depending on the agreement made with your manager.
* A background check will be conducted at the final stage of this recruitment process. If you are aware of any specific matters that may come up during this background check, we kindly ask you to be transparent about them during the recruitment process.

title: Kontinuitets- och övningssamordnare IT
description:
Svenska kraftnät är en nyckelaktör i energiomställningen. Vår IT-division växer för att möjliggöra en fördubblad elproduktion och en fossilfri framtid. Med den senaste tekniken ökar vi både infrastrukturens kapacitet och utvecklingstakten inom digitalisering och processer.
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 Som kontinuitets- och övningssamordnare på IT-divisionen på Svenska kraftnät kommer du att delta i byggandet och utvecklingen av divisionens kontinuitets- och övningsförmåga. Du kommer att verka på både strategisk och operativ nivå och i nära samverkan med interna enheter.
   

  

 Som övningssamordnare arbetar du divisionsövergripande och arbetet omfattar kontakter internt mellan divisionens avdelningar. Rollen sträcker sig från att koordinera, stötta och hjälpa organisationens avdelningar med kontinuitetsplanering och övningsverksamhet till samordning med övriga divisioners kontinuitets-och övningsverksamhet. Du kommer att koordinera gemensamma initiativ för utveckling av intern övningsverksamhet. Arbetet innebär även att utveckla divisionens tillgångsförvaltning, med målet att möjliggöra aktiv förråds- och reservdelshållning samt att utbilda medarbetare inom kontinuitets- och övningsfrågor.
   

  

 Kärnuppdraget för avdelning IT-säkerhet är att säkerställa Svenska kraftnäts förmåga att skydda, upptäcka och försvara sig mot interna och externa IT-säkerhetshot samt totalförsvar för division IT.
   

  

 Som kontinuitets- och övningssamordnare på enheten Styrning IT-Säkerhet inom IT-divisionen kommer du att vara en del av ett team med seniora kollegor. I rollen blir du en viktig del av IT och bidrar till att skapa både strategiska och operativa förutsättningar för Sveriges elförsörjning. Du kommer att arbeta tillsammans med IT divisionens totalförsvarsstrateg och kontinuitetsansvarig.
   

  

 För denna roll krävs god förståelse för IT-drift och förvaltning samt IT-organisationers utmaningar.
   

  

**Om dig**
**Skallkrav:**
 Som person är du kommunikativ och trivs med att ha många kontaktytor och tycker om att samarbeta med andra. Du är bra på att lösa problem och tar dig an arbetsuppgifter och utmaningar på ett strukturerat sätt. I rollen behöver du ha ett driv och är mån om att nå resultat tillsammans med dina kollegor. Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Vidare har du relevant högskoleutbildning inom IT eller annan likvärdig utbildning eller motsvarande kompetens förvärvad på annat sätt som Svenska kraftnät bedömer likvärdig.
   

  

 Du har också:
   

  

* Minst 3 års Relevant arbetslivserfarenhet inom IT med inriktning mot IT-kontinuitet.
* Erfarenhet av att leda och koordinera övningar och/eller workshops.
* Arbetslivserfarenhet från tillämpning av ramverk och standarder inom IT- och informationssäkerhet tex ISO27001 och NIST.
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka sig i tal och skrift på svenska och god förmåga uttrycka sig i tal och skrift på engelska.


 Det är
 **meriterande** 
 om du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av att driva frågor inom kontinuitet och återhämtning samt kravställning och uppföljning IT/OT-verksamhet.
* God kunskap i standard eller ramverk för kontinuitetshantering, t.ex. ISO27031 och ISO22301.
* Erfarenhet av kontinuitetshantering inom svensk myndighet/offentlig sektor eller större organisationer.
* Kunskap om totalförsvaret.
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetsskydd och hantering av säkerhetsskyddsklassificerad information.


**Bra att veta**
* Tjänsten är placerad i Sundbyberg
* Möjlighet till distansarbete upp till 50 %
* Sista ansökningsdag är den 17 april 2026. Vi använder urvalsfrågor istället för personligt brev och önskar ditt CV skrivet på svenska.
* Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning.
* Förmåner | Svenska kraftnät


**Vid frågor, kontakta gärna**
* Jonna Lidman, rekryterande chef, 010 489 24 15
* Victoria Waltenberg, rekryterare, 010 350 90 45
* Annika Ingeborn, SACO, 010 475 87 72
* Erica Midfjäll, ST, 010 475 87 31


 Du når oss också via e-post: fornamn.efternamn@svk.se.
   

  

 Jobba här – bli en viktig del av vår energiframtid | Svenska kraftnät
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare i samband med rekrytering, vi har upphandlade avtal som gäller för Svenska kraftnät som statlig myndighet.
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan ett beslut om anställning fattas kommer en säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) att genomföras i de fall befattningen innebär hantering av säkerhetsskyddsklassificerade uppgifter eller deltagande i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet. Om anställningen avser befattning i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövningen även att innefatta en registerkontroll och, i vissa fall, en särskild personutredning. För anställning på Svenska kraftnät kan det vara ett krav på svenskt medborgarskap i vissa befattningar. Med anställningen följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. För mer information om säkerhetsprövning Svenska kraftnät arbetar för att främja mångfald och motverka diskriminering och ser gärna sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter till våra rekryteringar. Lär känna Svenska kraftnät och hur det är att arbeta hos oss: Lär känna oss på Svenska kraftnät

title: Public Sector Solution Engineer - Sweden
description:
**Description**
 The Solution Engineer in our Public Sector sales organization is a client facing pre-sales consultant responsible for presenting product offerings and solutions in the best light to prospects and customers to best meet their business objectives. Our Solution Engineers are able to to take complex business solutions and pieces of technology and explain them in a simple and easy to understand way.
   

  

 As SE you understand customer goals and challenges and map those back to the Salesforce product portfolio. You design, build, and demonstrate unique and innovative solutions to address these challenges, you present Salesforce technology infrastructure, including demonstrating deep familiarity with the PaaS, SaaS and Agentic AI stack.
   

  

 In addition you participate in all appropriate product, sales, technical training and certifications to acquire and maintain the knowledge necessary to be effective in the position. Attain quarterly and annual objectives defined collaboratively with management and respond effectively to RFIs/RFPs. Active participation in a fast-paced high-energy market segment and balance multiple projects in a team-selling environment.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Coordinate and lead the entire client functional and technical solution cycle in close collaboration with sales colleagues and and the rest of the SE organization.
* Understand the customer’s needs, and establish Salesforce’s product as the best solution that solves unique challenges
* Convey a deep understanding of the Public Sector industry and technology as it pertains to Salesforce’s solutions
* Develop and deliver innovative custom solutions, build and present customized demos of Salesforce products including solution concepts to key decision-makers to address their business issues and needs showing business value.
* Participate in all appropriate product, sales, and procedural training and certifications to acquire and maintain the knowledge vital to be effective in the position
* Attain quarterly and annual objectives assigned by management
* Respond efficiently to RFPs
* Have a strong curiosity about growing your career and participating in our internal training programs and mentorship initiatives.
* Required Qualifications:
* Track record of solution engineering, consultancy, or delivery in an enterprise software solution organization. We are open to a variety of backgrounds for the role.
* Be at the forefront of the AI revolution, track record of adopting AI tools, experience with Vibe Coding.
* Proven oral, written, presentation, and interpersonal communication and relationship skills.
* Proven time management skills in a dynamic team environment.
* Ability to work as part of a team to tackle problems in dynamic, energizing environments.
* Inquisitive, practical, and passionate about technology and sharing knowledge.
* Loves to be the first to know something and to understand why and how things happen.
* Good at searching out information and experimenting, love to concentrate on a particular topic, and tackle puzzles.
* Good at explaining ideas and finding ways to keep people’s attention.
* Willing and able to travel occasionally
* Degree or equivalent relevant experience required. Experience will be evaluated based on alignment to the core competencies for the role (e.g. extracurricular leadership roles, military experience, volunteer work, etc.).
* Fluency in Swedish and English and right to work in Sweden.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Understanding the business requirements of customers within multiple industries and Public Sector in particular
* Salesforce Product knowledge and certifications preferred but knowledge/experience with other CRM solutions is welcome as well
* Passionate about AI, willing to lead the charge in the Agentic AI revolution

title: Technical Co-Founder | AI Engineer
description:
Stockholm | Equity | Co-Founder Role
 



  





 I’ve spent the last year tackling one of the most expensive and recurring headaches in the startup world: the
 **"design-and-decay" cycle** 
 of branding. Typically, organizations hire agencies to design assets that eventually become obsolete, complex, or disconnected from market reality. This cycle forces companies into periodic, costly, and disruptive re-brands.
 



  





 After countless interviews with founders , working directly with enterprise clients , and iterating on multiple MVPs , I’ve landed on a concept to make "brand intelligence" accessible to everyone—not just the top 5% of companies that can currently afford to it.
 



  





 I’m looking for a technical partner who is as excited as I am about what's possible with the current state of AI. It’s much more fun to build together than alone, and I’m ready to find the person who will help me build the engine to power this.
 



  





**The goal** 




  





 Democratise branding intelligence for the new era of business. To leverage human creativity, we build the infrastructure that integrates constant feedback loops and context to make better branding decisions.
 



  





**The plan** 




  





 Currently there is interest in the product and potential design partners. As an SSE alumni, I hope to
 **apply to Business Lab together in May** 
 . The go-to-market and distribution plans are already somewhat complete, but requires a demo to understand exact positioning.
 



  





**What’s already in place** 




  





 Market Validation: Extensive interviews with founders and startup hubs completed.
 



 Proven Concept: Final concept for the agile branding ecosystem reached as of April 2026.
 



 Strategic Roadmap: Clear path from agency integration to startup assistance and enterprise compliance.
 



  





**Who I am** 




  





 I've lived in many countries, built many startups and learned a lot along the way. I like challenges and dislike performative work. I'm driven by problems deemed "too complex" to solve, as I have often found that creative thinking is the main limiting factor. In my free-time I enjoy hiking and mechanical projects like building bikes and restoring boats- I'm more or less always doing some kind of project. My friends say I'm calm and open to any conversation, which I hope to be true.
 



  





**Who you are** 




  





 You are driven by the possibilities presented by
 **agentic workflows** 
 and
 **extensive data gathering** 
 . You’re down-to-earth, leadership-oriented, and prefer collaboration over working in a silo. If you have startup experience and some "lessons learned" under your belt, even better, as we can combine our shared learnings in order to make rock-solid decisions.
 



  





**The deal** 




  





 Equity: 20-30% (open to discussion) with vesting.
 



 Location: Stockholm, I have access to a space in Gamla Stan we can meet and sit.
 



 Role: CTO and Co-Founder. You will have a direct influence on the product, capital deployment, and the company’s evolution from day 1.
 



  





 If you’re ready to build the platform that makes brands iconic through intelligence, let’s talk.

title: Client Manager - Technical (Software)
description:
We’re looking for a
 **Client Manager** 
 to join us.
   

  

 I’m
 **Katti Ramber, Head of Live & Events within Tech Pay TV** 
 , and I’m searching for someone ready to grow with us. We’re a supportive, forward‑thinking team focused on
 **delivering reliable, engaging TV & Streaming experiences through high** 
**‑** 
**quality live moments, dependable recordings, and personalized content discovery.**
**What you’ll do:**
 You will translate customer needs into actionable engineering direction while ensuring high performance, stability, and platform compliance across all client applications.
   

  

* Handle technical requirements and turn them into clear guidance for engineering teams
* Build and maintain strong client relationships, acting as a trusted advisor
* Drive execution toward agreed targets and KPIs
* Coordinate and prioritize development for client applications in line with customer needs and platform requirements
* Support architectural decisions and ensure compatibility with devices such as set‑top boxes, smart TVs, and remote controls
* Foster clear communication between clients and technical teams while contributing to an inspiring, collaborative team culture


**What will help you thrive in this role:**
 You thrive in a technically complex environment where you can guide engineers, shape product quality, and translate customer needs into clear technical direction.
   

  

* Proven experience leading high‑performant engineering teams
* Strong hands‑on development background across client applications (Android, Web, Android TV, or similar)
* Ability to coach engineers on code quality, platform guidelines, and best development practices
* Skill in aligning customer requirements with engineering priorities to ensure smooth, reliable releases
* Strong communication skills to bridge client expectations and technical execution


**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet**
 At Telia, we’re a team of 15 000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity. As a
 **Leading Telecommunications Operator** 
 &
 **Climate Leader** 
 , we drive change with large-scale, impactful projects while building a sustainable, inclusive world.
   

  

 Here, you can
 **grow your skills, lead meaningful projects, and thrive in a supportive, diverse environment.** 
 Whether you’re taking your first step or your next, Telia is a place to grow, belong, and make a real impact.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.
   

  

**For Lithuanian applicants only: monthly salary range for this position - 6100-9200 EUR (gross) + annual performance bonuses** 
 . Although it may vary depending on your skills and experience.
   

  

**Ready to make better happen?**
 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **April 15.**
 If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our
 **Hiring Manager or Talent Acquisition Partner** 
 . Background checks will be part of the process.
   

  

**Equal opportunities**
 At Telia, we recognize talent by
 **professional skills and growth potential.** 
 We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where
 **your uniqueness is our strength.**
**Join us and let’s make better happen - together!**

title: Teknisk systemförvaltare till sektion Plattform och applikation inom IT
description:
Vi söker vi en teknisk systemförvaltare till sektionen Plattform och applikation inom IT.
   

  





 Södersjukhusets IT-organisation ansvarar för att våra IT-leverantörer levererar tjänster som möter vårdverksamhetens behov på ett säkert och kostnadseffektivt sätt. Våra tekniska plattformar ägs, driftas och utvecklas av bland annat Serviceförvaltningen, Locum och Telia. Många av de system och lösningar vi använder är gemensamma för Region Stockholm.
   

  





****Arbetsbeskrivning****




 Som teknisk systemförvaltare förvaltar och vidareutvecklar du system ur ett tekniskt perspektiv för att tillhandahålla optimalt IT-stöd för SöS verksamheter. Du stöttar den verksamhetsnära systemförvaltningen med kompetens kring systemets tekniska infrastruktur, integrationer och teknisk kravställning mot leverantör.
   

  





 Du jobbar nära arkitekter och IT-specialister och bildar tillsammans med andra tekniska systemförvaltare en grupp som utvecklar området och verkar tvärfunktionellt. Rollen innebär ett nära samarbete med vårdverksamheten, kollegor inom teknikorganisationen och våra externa leverantörer.
   

  





 I arbetsuppgifterna ingår exempelvis att:
 


* Kravställa kring infrastruktur och integrationer för att säkerställa att systemen är optimalt bestyckade utifrån verksamhetens behov
* Upprätta förvaltnings- och aktivitetsplan
* Planera och följa upp budget inom ditt ansvarsområde
* Följa upp arbeten som utförs av SöS och regionens leverantörer för att säkerställa att verksamheternas behov tas tillvara
* Bidra till en hållbar IT-arkitektur på Södersjukhuset
* Leda och/eller delta i uppdrag inom IT
* Leverantörsstyrning och avtalsuppföljning



****Kvalifikationer****




 Som person är du självgående, ansvarstagande och prestigelös. Du trivs att samarbeta med andra, både inom enheten men även med andra delar av verksamheten och våra leverantörer. Du har god kommunikativ förmåga och lätt för att skapa goda relationer.
   

  





 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  





**Kompetenskrav** 



* Minst tre års erfarenhet av teknisk systemförvaltning
* Relevant eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT eller erfarenhet som vi bedömer som motsvarande
* Goda kunskaper i svenska, i både tal och skrift



**Meriterande** 



* Erfarenhet av system som används inom vården
* Erfarenhet av arbete som IT-specialist och/eller teknisk projektledare
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom offentlig verksamhet eller Region Stockholm
* Erfarenhet av leverantörsstyrning i en beställar–utförarmodell



****Erbjudande****




 Våra medarbetare är vår viktigaste resurs och därför månar vi om att du ska ha ett utvecklande, tryggt och hållbart arbetsliv. Vi erbjuder många olika förmåner och fördelar oavsett var du befinner dig i livet och i karriären. Några av dessa förmåner är:
 


* Vidareutbildning. Vi erbjuder regelbundna, kompetenshöjande aktiviteter utifrån medarbetarens och verksamhetens behov.
* Ett generöst friskvårdsbidrag
* Personalgym och hälsoteam med fysioterapeuter, ergonomer och hälsopedagoger som kan stötta dig i din träning.
* Föräldrapenningtillägg och föräldralön.



 Läs mer om vårt erbjudande här
   

  





 Vi som arbetar på Södersjukhuset har ett viktigt uppdrag, varje medarbetares insats behövs. För att kunna utföra vårt arbete på bästa möjliga sätt och hantera de utmaningar vi möter, arbetar vi tillsammans med att stärka vår kultur och arbetsmiljö. Läs gärna mer om vår Ledar- och medarbetarsyn
   

  





****Övrigt****




 I denna rekrytering arbetar vi med löpande urval och intervjuer. 
   

  





**Välkommen med din ansökan!**




 När du söker jobb hos Region Stockholm behandlar vi personuppgifter som du lämnar i din ansökan, exempelvis kontaktuppgifter, CV och andra relevanta dokument. Uppgifterna används för att kunna hantera rekryteringsprocessen och bedöma din ansökan.
   

  





  

  

  





  

 Vi följer dataskyddsförordningen (GDPR) och har rutiner för att skydda dina uppgifter. I vissa fall kan personuppgifter komma att behandlas i tredje land (utanför EU/EES), exempelvis om vi använder tjänsteleverantörer med system eller servrar placerade där. Vid sådan behandling säkerställer vi att lämpliga skyddsåtgärder finns, till exempel genom standardavtalsklausuler eller andra godkända mekanismer.
   

  





  

  

  





  

 Mer information om hur vi behandlar personuppgifter och dina rättigheter hittar du i vår integritetspolicy.
   

  





  

  

  





  

  

  





  

 Södersjukhuset är ett av Nordens största akutsjukhus, vi finns i hjärtat av samhället, dag som natt för våra patienter. Hos oss står akutsjukvården i centrum och utgör tillsammans med de stora folksjukdomarna vår specialitet. Vi bedriver omfattande klinisk forskning och utbildning, för oss är det viktigt att kombinera det stora sjukhusets möjligheter med den nära och personliga patientkontakten. På Södersjukhuset är alla en del i en större helhet där vi tillsammans skapar morgondagens vård.
   

  





  

  

  





  

  

  





****Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm****




 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  





 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  





 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  





 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.
   

  





 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm

title: Data Engineer
description:
**HAYPP GROUP**
 We address one of the world’s biggest problems – how to end smoking. There are 1,1 billion smokers in the world. Around 8 million people die every year from smoking-related diseases. Our goal is to significantly reduce death rates, save lives and inspire people to choose smoke-free enjoyment. How? By offering people other nicotine products online.
   

  

 Haypp Group is one of the Nordics’ leading e-commerce groups with eleven store brands, present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 million active consumers. Through brands such as Snusbolaget.se, Northerner.com, Nicokick.com etc., we sell nicotine pouches, Swedish style snus online as well as disposable vapes. With our headquarters located on Östgötagatan in Stockholm we are 300 team members mainly but not exclusively based in Sweden. Also, we are an innovative and fast-moving company that is growing rapidly, driving sustainable business and are changing the world in the process. We are currently on an exciting expansion journey, converting more and more smokers to smoke-free alternatives across all our markets globally.
   

  

**THE ROLE**
 We’re now looking for a Data Engineer to join our data engineering team in our tech department. You’ll join us on a journey of constant improvement, development and scaling of the data infrastructure powering our business insights. We’re on AWS, using services like Redshift, S3, MWAA, Kinesis, ECS, etc, and dbt + Airflow for sourcing all our e-com data from multiple sources and building insights.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
 As a Data Engineer in Haypp, you’ll find modern technologies, agile workflows, and tight integration at the heart of the business. Implement, develop, and maintain data pipelines connecting to multiple data sources such as in-house E-com platform, Google Analytics, Klaviyo, etc. You will be working with the following things on a daily basis:
   

  

* Build and maintain data pipelines and integrate to new data sources.
* Model and deliver business ready data in line with industry best practices.
* Share ownership of the integrity and quality of data.
* Liaise with stakeholders from all parts of the organisation to develop and maintain the data platform to meet business objectives.
* Grow through ownership, collaboration, and real-world data challenges.


**What We Want From You**
 We place great value on collaboration, communication, and a professional approach to teamwork, as well as relevant experience and technical competence.
   

  

**Successful Candidates Also Meet The Following Requirements**
* Previous experience in Data Engineering roles.
* Fluency in SQL and Python is a must to succeed at this role.
* Experience working with dbt and Airflow.
* Experience with AWS will get you started quickly, but experience with any other cloud platform such as GCP or Azure is also considered advantageous.
* Experience building testable, scalable and maintainable code.
* You can come from any industry background, but experience within ecommerce would be a plus.
* You have a technical mindset, but also appreciate commercial thinking.
* Are a team player – needs to be able to interact with the team, be adaptable.
* A good communicator, both with technical and non-technical counterparts.
* Fluent in English. Swedish is not a requirement but is a plus.
* Curious with a will to learn and develop.


**What We Offer**
 We are a value driven company with our values
 *We team up* 
 ,
 *Innovation Drives Us* 
 ,
 *Inclusion and Non-Hierarchy* 
 and
 *Going the Extra Mile* 
 at the heartbeat of everything that we do. With us you can always expect to get help from people who want to achieve things together and to be able to speak your mind in every social constellation you are part of. We highly value all ideas no matter where they come from, and we are not afraid to try new things out. We are also welcoming, inclusive and everyone at Haypp Group has a voice. In addition, we seize opportunities by putting in hands-on, hard work and celebrating when we reach our goals. With us, you should always feel safe, appreciated and valued but at the same time challenged and excited.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Because we recognize that our team members are our most important differentiator, we offer our team members generous benefits. We offer the following perks to everyone at Haypp Group:
   

  

* Premium ITP1 occupational pension savings plan
* Insurance plan, including private healthcare
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Parental pay lift
* Wellness allowance of 5,000 SEK per year
* Lots of social happenings


**SEND US YOUR APPLICATION TODAY!**
 If this sounds like a place where you would want to contribute and grow, let us know you’re interested by submitting your application!
   

  

 Haypp Group is committed to equality and diversity, and we welcome applications from all qualified individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion, age, gender, sexual orientation, disability, and marital status. We want to offer you great recruitment experience, and if there is anything we can do to make you more comfortable in the process with us, please let us know.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the role or what it’s like to work at Haypp Group in general, feel free to reach out to our responsible recruiter Lea Sjösten at lea.sjosten@hayppgroup.com. We look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

 The Haypp Group is spearheading the global transformation from smoking to healthier product alternatives. With origins in Scandinavia our extensive experience from pioneering markets in smoke free alternatives, as well as being a leader in the e-commerce sector, we now fully bring our vision to a global scale.
   

  

 With 11 e-commerce brands, the Haypp Group is present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 100 000 consumers.

title: Scaled Customer Success Manager
description:
****Join us to shape the future!****
 Teamtailor is a global Employer Branding and ATS SaaS platform used by over 12,000 companies, 200,000 users, and available in 90 countries worldwide. 🌍
   

  

 Working at Teamtailor means being part of a dynamic, fast-paced tech company that values impact and responsibility. Our workplace fosters an environment where everyone can contribute meaningfully to the growth of the company. 🎉🥳
   

  

 Building a diverse team with a wide range of experiences, skills, and backgrounds has always been central to Teamtailor’s mission, and it remains a strength today. We welcome all individuals who share our vision and are committed to contributing to our collective success. Join us in helping companies and people communicate in more meaningful ways to make life-changing decisions together.👫
   

  

 That's why we're expanding our Customer Success department and looking for a
   

  

 Scaled CSM to
 **drive the commercial success and long-term happiness** 
 of our customers in the
 **Small & Medium Business Segment** 
 . You will create positive and engaging experiences that empower users, helping them discover the full potential of our platform. Your focus is on building
 **scalable solutions while maintaining a personal touch** 
 , keeping interactions close and meaningful, and ensuring every customer journey is both fun and successful! ✨
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities Will Be To**
* Renewal Management: Oversee the renewal process and address inquiries about contracts and invoices to ensure customer satisfaction and retention. 💰
* Customer Segmentation & Communication: Segment SMB customers and implement scalable communication strategies using digital tools for a personalized touch. 📊💬
* Escalation & Solution Management: Proactively address challenges, working closely with internal teams to ensure smooth and seamless customer experiences.🤝
* Customer Meetings & Strategy: Conduct meetings on key topics like renewals and feedback, ensuring smooth transitions between teams for cohesive management. 📅
* Communication & Support: Partner with the Digital Success Manager to create engaging content and adjust strategies based on customer trends. 🎨📈


**What You’ll Enjoy**
* Responsibility for your own customer base 💼
* Exciting development opportunities and career growth 🚀
* Working with a top product in the market 🏆
* Fixed salary with commission benefits 💰
* A vibrant multicultural team 🌍
* Annual company trip to a surprise destination 😎
* A work culture that encourages freedom with responsibility.


****Is this You?****
* Experience in SaaS, HR, recruiting, or project management 💼
* Strong communication, adaptability, and problem-solving skills 🔍
* Fluent in English and Swedish (other languages are a plus) 🗣️
* Up for some post-work fun with your colleagues? Fantastic! We're all about themed after-hours hangouts! 🪩


**If you’re passionate about driving customer success and want to join a dynamic team, we’d love to hear from you!** 
 🎉

title: Skolvaktmästare och IT-tekniker
description:
**Välkommen till oss**
 Stockholm – vår huvudstad med miljoner drömmar, förväntningar och ambitioner. Vi jobbar för alla som lever här idag och i framtiden. Nu söker vi dig som vill tänka stort, nytt och annorlunda med oss – för stockholmarna.
   

  

**Vill du vara med och skapa en skola från grunden?**
 Slakthusområdets gymnasium öppnar i augusti 2026 i Stockholms nyaste stadsdel. Vi startar med cirka 250 elever i årskurs 1 och beräknas vara fullt utbyggd med 800 elever till år tre. Skolan är helt nybyggd med studieanpassade lokaler och erbjuder tre program: Ekonomiprogrammet, Samhällsvetenskapsprogrammet och Försäljnings- och serviceprogrammet. Att arbeta på Slakthusområdets gymnasium innebär att du får vara med i uppbyggandet av skolan. Här finns möjligheten att påverka strukturer, arbetssätt, kultur och traditioner.
   

  

 Inför skolstarten söker vi en IT-tekniker och vaktmästare. Tjänsten är en varierad tjänst med både vaktmästartjänster och att arbeta som IT-tekniker.
   

  

 Vår vision är att vara en skola som förenar nyfikenhet, kreativitet och entreprenörskap. Vi tillämpar en varierad undervisning med verklighetsnära fallstudier och projekt i nära samarbete med våra externa partners. Hos oss utvecklas eleverna i en trygg miljö med höga förväntningar och ett starkt elevnära förhållningssätt. Läs mer på; https://slakthusomradetsgymnasium.stockholm/
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 Tjänsten består av vaktmästartjänster samt arbete som IT-tekniker. Vi söker en person som kan arbeta med en viss flexibilitet, tjänsten är främst förlagd till dagtid men du ska kunna arbeta sen eftermiddag/kväll. Första året är tjänsten ca 60-80% beroende på kompetens. Den kan komma att utökas nästa läsår. Arbetsuppgifterna kan bland annat vara:
   

  

* inköp av material och beställningar via Agresso
* intern flytt av möbler inom huset, kassera möbler, enklare reparation av möbler
* sätta upp nya arbetsplatser - IT kopplingar, möblering, mm
* enklare målning, snickeriarbeten, sandning på vintern och så vidare.
* SBA kontroller
* rondering av fastigheterna
* kontakt med fastighetsägare samt hantera felanmälningar
* ansvara för utdelning av elever och lärares datorer samt hjälpa dem med lösenord och annat de behöver för att komma igång med datorerna
* hjälpa elever och lärare med frågor om datorer och dess mjukvara
* beställningar av datorer och annan teknisk utrustning
* serva projektorer, skrivare med mera


 Din kompetens och erfarenhet
   

  

 Vi söker dig som:
   

  

* är utbildad vaktmästare och/eller IT-tekniker eller har arbetslivserfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer som likvärdig
* har flerårig erfarenhet i motsvarande roll
* har goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift
* har hög digital kompetens.
* meriterande är erfarenhet av Stockholms stads digitala plattformar och system
* kan hantera tunga lyft
* är beredd på att göra de arbetsuppgifter som behövs. Som nystartad skola kommer det att finnas många olika arbetsuppgifter och du behöver vara flexibel och vara beredd att utföra arbetsuppgifter som uppstår


**Personliga egenskaper**
 Vi söker dig som:
   

  

* är engagerad, nyfiken och vågar pröva nya idéer.
* vill arbeta på en skola där både struktur och kreativitet värderas högt.
* trivs i en miljö där man samarbetar och bygger saker tillsammans.
* har förmåga att både ta initiativ och bidra till en gemensam arbetskultur.
* vill vara med och skapa en skola där elever känner sig trygga, sedda och motiverade.


**Ansökan och tillsättning**
 Välkommen med din ansöka. Intervjuer kan komma att ske löpande under ansökningstiden. Samtliga tjänster är tillsvidareanställningar.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet.

title: ERP Support & System Specialist
description:
**Why Join Us?**
 We’re on a mission to empower people with disabilities to do what they once did or never thought possible. As the world-leader in assistive communication solutions, we empower our customers to express themselves, connect with the world, and live richer lives.
   

  

 At Tobii Dynavox, you can grow your career within a dynamic, global company that has a clear, impactful purpose - with the flexibility to also do what truly matters to you outside of work. What’s more, you’ll be part of a work culture where collaboration is the norm and individuality is welcomed.
   

  

 As a member of our team, you’ll have the power to grow ideas in an unconventional environment. At the same time, you’ll work in a culture of ongoing learning and development, allowing you to constantly expand your area of expertise.
   

  

**About the role:**
 We are scaling our IT Product Management function to deliver business outcomes through our enterprise platforms and are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented
 **ERP Support & System Specialist** 
 to join our team and ensure the smooth running of our ERP environment.
   

  

 As Support & System Specialist, you will be responsible for providing first-line ERP support, managing user access and roles in Dynamics 365 F&O, and coordinating the resolution of technical and functional issues between users, IT, and business stakeholders. You will play a critical part in maintaining reliable daily operations and supporting continuous improvement initiatives.
   

  

**Key responsibilities:**
* ERP User Support: Provide fast and effective support to ERP users by promptly triaging and resolving reported issues.
* User Administration in Dynamics 365 F&O: Administer user roles, permissions, and environment setups within D365 to maintain system security and compliance.
* Testing and Release Coordination: Coordinate testing and release readiness activities in collaboration with cross-functional teams.
* Cross-Team Collaboration: Work closely with IT, applications specialists, and end users to support clear communication and efficient issue resolution.
* System Performance Monitoring: Monitor system performance and proactively identify areas for improvement. Implement necessary actions to enhance reliability and efficiency, supporting continuous optimization of the ERP environment.


 What we are looking for
   

  

 Technical/Functional Skills
   

  

* ERP Experience: Hands-on experience with Microsoft D365 F&O, with a solid understanding of platform functionalities and administration.
* Problem Solving: Demonstrated ability to troubleshoot technical and functional issues, approaching challenges with a proactive and analytical mindset.


 Soft Skills
   

  

* Communication: Strong communication skills, with the ability to clearly convey information to both technical and non-technical stakeholders and facilitate collaboration across teams.
* Collaboration: Working effectively with cross-functional teams helps drive successful outcomes and fosters a positive workplace culture.
* Curiosity: Demonstrates a strong curiosity about surrounding systems within the ERP environment and shows self‑driven initiative to explore, understand, and find solutions.


**Apply today!**
 We believe in empowering individuals - including our own employees - to reach their full potential. So, if you want to change lives while growing your own career, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**Where we stand:**
 We believe diversity not only enriches our workplace culture, but also gives us a strategic advantage. Working with people from a variety of backgrounds and perspectives helps us all become better communicators, better problem solvers, and better human beings. Our differences make us stronger.
   

  

 Tobii Dynavox values equality of opportunity, human dignity, and racial/ethnic and cultural diversity. Tobii Dynavox does not discriminate against individuals on the basis of race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion, disability, age, veteran status, ancestry, or national or ethnic origin.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity Employer/AA Women/Minorities/Veterans/Disabled

title: Account Technology Strategist
description:
**Overview**
 As an
 **Account Technology Strategist (ATS)** 
 at Microsoft Sweden, you will play a key strategic role in supporting Sweden’s largest government authorities and municipalities on their digital transformation journey. Together with the Account Executive, you will work in a highly structured and collaborative way to help customers realize their objectives by leveraging Microsoft’s cloud platforms.
   

  

 In this role, you act as a
 **trusted strategic advisor** 
 , guiding customers in how to modernize and transform their IT environments towards Microsoft’s cloud ecosystem — with a strong focus on
 **Azure, Security, and Artificial Intelligence** 
 . You will work closely with a limited number of strategically selected customers, building deep relationships and long-term engagement models.
   

  

 Together with each customer, you will establish a clear and outcome-driven technology roadmap that supports their mission, regulatory requirements, and societal responsibilities. The role requires both strategic perspective and the ability to translate complex challenges into concrete, value-driven solutions using Microsoft technologies.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with internal Microsoft teams, partners, and specialists, ensuring alignment across sales, engineering, and delivery. Your work will directly contribute to helping Sweden’s public sector organizations increase efficiency, security, resilience, and innovation capability in an increasingly digital and AI-driven landscape.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who thrives at the intersection of
 **technology, strategy, and customer impact** 
 , and who is motivated by making a tangible difference for society through technology.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Customer Strategy & Trusted Advisor**
* Build and deepen trusted relationships with senior technology and innovation leaders (e.g., CIO/CTO/CISO and business technology decision makers), in close partnership with the Account Executive.
* Understand and document the customer’s business objectives, technology landscape, and AI & Security strategy to strengthen customer outcomes and the overall customer experience.
* Lead executive technology briefings that align Microsoft solutions to customer strategic priorities and help accelerate customer decisions and progress.


**Technology Strategy, Architecture & Roadmap**
* Translate customer business priorities into a feasible technology strategy and roadmap, incorporating Microsoft’s portfolio of solutions.
* Create and maintain a structured customer roadmap (e.g., a multi‑horizon plan) and ensure new initiatives fit the customer’s broader enterprise architecture and priorities.
* Own and continuously refresh the Customer Secure AI Assessment, including customer technology landscape and roadmap insights, to drive high‑impact AI and security discussions and opportunities.


**Orchestration & Execution (One Microsoft / Partner Ecosystem)**
* Orchestrate internal and partner technical resources to deliver end‑to‑end technology leadership and remove technical blockers, working across solution areas and execution stages.
* Operate as One Microsoft, ensuring strong alignment and clear communication across the account’s technology virtual team to deliver a differentiated customer experience.
* Collaborate closely with key stakeholders such as Account Executive, CSAM, CSA, Solutions Engineers, and other internal and partner team members to drive shared outcomes.


**Operational & Commercial Excellence**
* Drive Microsoft business growth and customer technology transformation by ensuring pipeline is robust and technically viable across solution areas.
* Lead technical governance and technology decision maker (TDM) conversations with the customer and account team to realize value across solutions.
* Build and own a customer consumption plan (where applicable) in collaboration with Account Executive/CSAM, and proactively work with the customer to ensure adoption and value realization.


**Technology Leadership, Storytelling & Continuous Learning**
* Create and land a compelling end‑to‑end AI and security narrative with customers, and share learnings and customer wins to scale best practices.
* Continuously strengthen business, industry, and technical acumen—especially across AI and Security—and take accountability for learning and development. [
* Leverage Microsoft AI tools and automation to reduce non‑core tasks and increase time spent in high‑value customer engagements.


**Compliance**
* Model integrity and ethical behavior, adhere to company policies and processes, and complete required compliance training by due dates.


**Qualifications**
**Required qualifications:**
* Proven experience in a senior technology advisory, solution architecture, or strategic technical sales role, working with complex customers and long‑term engagements.
* Strong understanding of cloud platforms and digital transformation, with particular focus on Microsoft Azure, Security, and AI (including modern data and AI‑driven solutions).
* Demonstrated ability to translate business and societal objectives into technology strategies and roadmaps, and to guide customers through structured transformation journeys.
* Experience working with large public sector organizations, government authorities, municipalities, or other highly regulated environments.
* Ability to engage credibly with senior customer stakeholders (e.g., CIO, CTO, CISO, innovation and digital leaders) and act as a trusted strategic advisor.
* Strong collaboration skills and experience working in virtual, cross‑functional teams, partnering closely with Account Executives, customer success, engineering, and partners.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to explain complex technical topics clearly to both technical and non‑technical audiences.
* Fluency in English and Swedish, both written and spoken.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Hands‑on experience with enterprise architecture, security architecture, or cloud adoption frameworks.
* Experience driving or supporting AI initiatives, advanced analytics, or data platform transformations in complex organizations.
* Knowledge of public sector regulatory, security, and compliance requirements, and how these influence cloud and AI adoption.
* Experience working with partners and ecosystems to deliver end‑to‑end customer outcomes.
* Background in roles combining technology leadership and commercial responsibility, such as solution sales, technical account leadership, or strategic consulting.


**Personal Attributes**
* Strategic mindset with a strong customer‑outcome orientation and ability to think long‑term.
* Structured, disciplined way of working, combined with the ability to navigate ambiguity and complexity.
* High level of credibility, integrity, and professionalism, aligned with Microsoft’s values.
* Curiosity and continuous learning mindset, particularly around AI, security, and emerging technologies.
* Passion for using technology to create real impact for society and support the mission of public sector organizations.


 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about
 **requesting accommodations.**

title: Utbildningschef
description:
*Plushögskolan AB är Sveriges största privata anordnare av yrkeshögskoleutbildningar. Genom varumärkena Affärshögskolan, Vårdyrkeshögskolan och Teknikhögskolan bedrivs YH-utbildningar i form av program och kurser, företagsutbildningar och skräddarsydda koncept. Vi utbildar bland annat inom ekonomi, försäljning, marknadsföring, samhällsbyggnad, IT, teknik, energi, vård, omsorg och socialt arbete.*




**Är du en strategisk ledare som kan tillgodose regionens framtida kompetensbehov?**




 Plushögskolan AB har varit verksam i sin nuvarande form sedan 2006 och bedriver idag YH-utbildningar på femton orter runt om i Sverige. Utbildningarna bedriver vi inom Affärshögskolan, Teknikhögskolan och Vårdyrkeshögskolan. Detta gör vi med ett stort engagemang och med ambitionen att förse arbetsmarknaden med kompetent arbetskraft. För att nå vårt mål samarbetar vi nära med näringslivet både regionalt och nationellt vilket leder till jobb för våra studerande och ger näringslivet den arbetskraft de efterfrågar. 
   

  





**Är du en målinriktad och erfaren ledare som drivs av att arbeta med ständiga förbättringar?**




 Som utbildningschef för Plushögskolans verksamheter i Stockholm, Västerås och Eskilstuna förväntas du fortsätta utveckla vår affärsidé. Du blir en nyckelperson i en miljö präglad av affärsmässighet, kvalitetsmedvetenhet och högt tempo. Ditt yttersta ansvar blir att leda och utveckla verksamheten tillsammans med kompetenta och engagerade medarbetare.
   

  





**Om tjänsten**




 Rollen som utbildningschef innebär fullt ansvar för resultat, kvalitet, personal samt arbetsmiljö på de tre orterna. Du har direkt personalansvar för ett tiotal medarbetare. Du är stationerad i Stockholm. Kontinuerliga resor till de andra orterna ingår i din vardag.
 


**Det här söker vi**

**Formell kompetens:**




 Rätt person är en erfaren ledare och chef, gärna med erfarenhet från affärsdriven utbildningsverksamhet. I tidigare roller har du haft resultatansvar och har arbetat med verksamhetsutveckling och förändringsledning. Du har verkat i miljöer som ställer krav på ett affärsmässigt synsätt och du ska ha vana att leda medarbetare på distans. Vidare ser vi att du har en akademisk utbildning, med fördel inom pedagogik, och har arbetat med ekonomiska uppföljningar och budget.
   

  





**Personlig kompetens:**




 Som person är du skicklig på att se till helheten, skapa samarbetsytor med det regionala näringslivet, göra analyser och lösa problem som uppstår. Du är prestigelös i ditt förhållningssätt och räds inte att fatta beslut eller ifrågasätta när så krävs. Förändringar och ett högt tempo är något du trivs med. Du motiveras av att skapa positiva resultat tillsammans med medarbetare och samarbetspartners.
 
 Du brinner för att leverera och utveckla utbildningar av högsta klass. Att vi har ett myndighetsuppdrag innebär att du tycker att det är viktigt att leva efter lagar och förordningar och att omsätta dessa till de studerandes bästa
 **.** 



**Vi erbjuder dig**

 Vi erbjuder en utvecklande arbetsmiljö där det inom Academedia finns många karriärvägar. Genom vårt utvecklingsarbete får du låta dig själv utmanas och växa. 
   

  





 Som medarbetare hos oss har du möjlighet till kompetensutveckling genom Academedia Academy samt intern och extern professionsutveckling. Hos oss får du självklart kollektivavtalade förmåner och försäkringar men även friskvårdsbidrag, pensionsrådgivning, personalrabatter samt möjlighet till fördelaktiga köp genom netto- och bruttolöneväxling.
 


**Anställningsform**

 Anställningen är på heltid med provanställning i 6 månader som sedan övergår till en tillsvidareanställning. Anställningen är knuten till kollektivavtal.
   

  





**Tillträdesdag:** 
 1 juli 2026 eller enligt överenskommelse.
   

  





**Placeringsort:** 
 Stockholm
   

  





**Kontaktperson**




 För frågor är du varmt välkommen att höra av dig till verksamhetschef Maria Sandin, via mail: maria.sandin@plushogskolan.se
   

  





**Välkommen med din ansökan!**




 Stämmer detta in på dig? Vi strävar efter att tillvarata olika perspektiv och erfarenheter, därför uppmuntrar vi en mångfald av sökanden. Ansök med
 **CV** 
 och
 **personligt brev** 
 där du motiverar varför du skulle passa för tjänsten.
   

  





 Vi kallar löpande till intervju så skicka in din ansökan redan idag. Tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum.

title: Full Stack Product Engineer
description:
**FULL STACK PRODUCT ENGINEER — EXAKT STOCKHOLM** 




  





***Corporate merch is a billion-dollar market still running on spreadsheets and phone calls.***




***We're changing that. Want in?***




  





 Every major brand in the world buys merchandise — branded goods, staff kits, product launches, global campaigns. It's a massive, fast-growing market. And a lot of it is still managed the old way: manually, slowly, with no real digital infrastructure connecting the pieces.
 



  





 Exakt has been at the centre of that market since 2004, working with brands like Samsung, Absolut and Electrolux. We've built the platform foundation. Now we're building the layer on top, the part that makes this industry genuinely work differently. There's no off-the-shelf solution for what we're making.
 



  





 The interesting part isn't just the automation. It's knowing exactly where the process breaks, and building something smart enough to remove those obstacles before anyone runs into them.
 



  





 The role in plain terms
 



 Full stack across TypeScript and React on the frontend, Node APIs in the middle, and a MedusaJS headless commerce backend — all running on GCP with PostgreSQL, Redis, and Prisma underneath. Terraform for infra, Clerk for auth, Stripe for payments.
 



  





**Required** 
 :
 


* Typescript
* React
* PostgreSQL
* Git
* Google Cloud Platform or equivalent



**Nice to have** 
 :
 


* MedusaJS
* Terraform
* NextJS
* Redis
* Clerk
* Stripe
* Prisma



  





 Real product influence, your decisions shape how this works, long term
 



 High autonomy, high responsibility, no micromanagement, but no hand-holding either
 



  





**This is probably not for you if** 




*You need detailed specs before you can move* 




*You prefer a large team with clearly defined lanes* 




*You're not interested in the business side of what you're building* 




  





 Timing
 



 We're ready to move fast. Team is in place, stack is running, and we can have you building within days. If you're available now or soon — let's talk!
 



  





 Location
 



 We're based on Lidingö — only 3km from Subwaystation Ropsten and Värtan, just across the bridge. We're also looking at finding new office in Frihamnen next year.
 



  






 funatwork@exakt.se

title: Sales Assistant - Max Mara Fashion Group
description:
Would you like to join
 **Max Mara Fashion Group** 
 in
 **Stockholm** 
 as
 **Sales Assistant** 
 ?
 



  





 The
 **Sales Assistant** 
 is responsible for sharing the methodology and DNA of the company to clients in order to drive sales, grow the base and sustain the brand.
 



  





***You’ll be in charge of:***



* Welcome and help customers, providing an excellent in-store experience at all times.
* Demonstrate brand and product knowledge, based upon the training program provided, as well as keeping up to date with the luxury environment and competitors.
* Proactively deliver the brand's selling ceremony, maximizing sales opportunities in order to achieve store sales target and KPIs.
* Visual Merchandising Operations in the shop
* Actively builds client confidence by creating an engaging interactive experience
* Gain new clients, meeting conversion goals and continues to service existing clients



  





***If you:***



* Passion for fashion
* Customer-oriented approach
* Expertise in Retail Sales
* Strong interpersonal, organizational, and communication skills
* Fluent in English language



  





**Join US!** 




  





***About Max Mara Fashion Group***




 Max Mara Fashion Group is recognized throughout the world as the precursor of modern
 **pret-à-porter fashion** 
 .
 



  





 The Company was founded in
 **1951** 
 with the aim of offering “haute de gamme” feminine clothing, produced according to excellent industrial processes.
 



  





**Passion** 
 ,
 **commitment** 
 and
 **tradition** 
 have created a unique fashion style:
 


* 9 main brands
* 60+ fashion collections every season
* 14.000.000+ clothes sold every year
* 2.500+ single-brand shops
* 10.000+ multi-brand shops
* 27 languages spoken in the Max Mara Fashion Group world
* 5.500+ employees in the world



  





 Our ecosystem is made of
 **44 Depts** 
 , including Fashion Design, Marketing & Sales, Operations, Retail, Stores, ICT, Architecture Design, Economics, BI, etc.
 



  





 The Digital Division was the latest department to be established in 2013, with the aim of integrating the company's digital assets, as well as solutions and services related to e-commerce and digital marketing.
 



  





 Discover your potential and your substance with a career at MMFG, where work means passion, embracing new challenges, learning from each other, sharing a vision, teamwork and making it come true!
 



  





 Max Mara Fashion Group is an equal opportunity employer. Everyone is welcome!
 



  





**#joinus**

title: AI Platform Analyst
description:
**Job ID: 3526**
 We are looking for an AI Platform Analyst to drive the development and adoption of AI-powered solutions that strengthen our ability to detect and investigate financial crime.
   

  

 The role is permanent and will be based in Helsinki.
   

  

**About Our Team**
 Meet the AI & Machine Learning team. Our role is to improve how we detect and investigate financial crime with the help of AI and machine learning to keep our customers, Nordea and society safe. Our team is about 25 people working out of Stockholm, Helsinki and Copenhagen as a part of the Group Financial Crime Prevention (GFCP) unit that provides financial crime prevention services to all of the bank.
   

  

 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in how we work and how we make decisions – and that we imagine you share with us.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
**Main responsibilities in this role:**
* Define and communicate the functional and non-functional requirements of the AI Platform spanning predictive, generative and agentic workflows.
* Engage with internal stakeholders to gather requirements, present findings, and collect feedback.
* Create user stories and acceptance criteria for platform capabilities.
* Bridge communication between data scientists, business users, engineers and platform vision to ensure alignment.
* Document business processes and integration requirements for AI solutions.
* Translate business needs into AI platform requirements, supporting the full cycle from ideation to delivery.
* Collaborate with team members to unlock new capabilities and deliver value in fighting financial crime.


**Who You Are**
**This is the right role for you if:**
* You're ambitious and enjoy bringing ideas, exploring their potential, and presenting the results. You're passionate about ensuring production excellence in machine learning operations, ensuring both the bank’s and society's safety.
* You’re collaborative and thrive in cross-functional environments, comfortable working at the intersection of business and technology. You communicate clearly and confidently with both technical and non-technical audiences, and you’re comfortable driving work forward independently.


**Your background and skills include:**
* BSc or MSc in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, a relevant technical field or equivalent practical experience.
* Proven experience as an IT Analyst or in a similar role in IT development within a large organization.
* Practical experience with Python development and configuration management.
* Experience with public cloud providers (AWS, Azure or GCP) and Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
