* Proven ability to manage complex stakeholder relationships across multiple domains, including expectations management.


**It would be ideal if you also:**
* Experience with agile methodologies and product development lifecycle.
* Ability to work cross-functionally with engineering, architecture, and data science teams.
* Have professional experience from working in regulated industries, i.e. Banking, Government, etc.


**What We Offer**
 People come here when they want to get somewhere. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

 A culture that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

 Hybrid working model – we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

 Diversity and inclusion are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Please Submit you application as soon as possible as we start with interviews on ongoing basis. For more information, you’re welcome to contact Björn Hertzberg (bjorn.hertzberg@nordea.com), Head of Data Science in FCIIA. Note that we do not accept applications through email.
   

  

**We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.**
**We build relationships.** 
 We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

**We learn and develop.** 
 We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

**We lead change.** 
 We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

**We are Nordea.** 
 We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us.
   

  

 A Background Check will be performed for the person selected for this position, including internal applicants.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Finland:** 
 A security clearance will be performed for the person selected for this position.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Sweden:** 
 For union information, please contact Finansförbundet at finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACO at SacoNordea@nordea.com .
   

  

**Only for candidates in Poland:** 
 Please include permit for processing personal data in CV as following:
   

  

 In accordance with art. 6 (1) a and b. Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016 on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data, and repealing Directive 95/46/EC (General Data Protection Regulation) hereinafter ‘GDPR’. I agree to have: my personal data, education and employment history proceeded for the purposes of current and future recruitment processes in Nordea Bank Abp.
   

  

 The administrator of your personal data is: Nordea Bank Abp operating in Poland through its Branch, address: Aleja Edwarda Rydza Śmiglego 20, 93-281 Łodź. Your personal data will be processed for the recruitment processes in Nordea Bank Abp. You have a right to access your personal data, right to rectify and right to delete. Disclosing the personal data in the scope specified by the provisions of Polish Labour Code from 26 June 1974 and executive acts are mandatory. Providing personal data is necessary to conduct the recruitment processes. The request for the deletion of your personal data means resignation from further participation in recruitment processes and causes the immediate removal of your application. Detailed information concerning processing of your personal data can be found at: https://www.nordea.com/en/doc/nordea-privacy-policy-for-applicants.pdf
   

  

 We reserve the right to reply only to selected applications.

title: IAM Administrator
description:
**IAM-Ansvarig till Telia Cygate**
**V** 
**ill du vara med och forma framtidens identitets- och säkerhetslösningar?**
 Jag heter Petra Peric, Head of Cloud Operations, och jag letar efter någon som vill växa tillsammans med oss.
   

  

 Hos oss får du möjligheten att arbeta nära verksamheten med teknik som verkligen gör skillnad. Som IAM‑ansvarig blir du en nyckelperson i att skapa en säker, stabil och framtidssäkrad IT‑miljö – samtidigt som du får stort utrymme att påverka, utveckla och driva innovation.
   

  

 Vi tror på ansvar, öppenhet och samarbete. Här arbetar vi i ett engagerat team där idéer uppmuntras, kunskap delas och där vi tillsammans bygger lösningar som gör vardagen enklare för hela organisationen.
   

  

 Vill du växa med oss i en roll där teknik, säkerhet och utveckling går hand i hand? Då kan du vara den vi söker.
   

  

**Vad du kommer att göra i rollen:**
 Som IAM‑ansvarig ansvarar du för drift, förvaltning och vidareutveckling av vår AD-miljö – både on‑prem och i molnet. Du arbetar brett med identitet, säkerhet och accesshantering och är en nyckelperson när det gäller att säkerställa en stabil, säker och modern infrastruktur.
   

  

 Du kommer att samarbeta nära våra IT‑team inom Cloud Operations och bidra i projekt kopplade till AD, integrationer, IAM, PAM och automatisering.
   

  

**Dina ansvarsområden**
* Förvalta, utveckla och optimera vår Active Directory‑miljö (on‑prem/Entra-ID).
* Säkerställa korrekt hantering av användarkonton, grupper, behörigheter och GPO:er.
* Hantera och granska säkerhetsgrupper och accesser för att säkerställa rätt åtkomstnivåer.
* Arbeta med IAM, inklusive SSO och multifaktorautentisering (MFA).
* Delta i och driva projekt inom AD‑migreringar, integrationer, IDM/IAM/PAM och säkerhetsförbättringar.
* Felsöka incidenter och problem inom AD och relaterade system.
* Samarbeta med IT‑funktioner för att säkerställa att AD‑miljön stödjer verksamheten.
* Dokumentera processer, konfigurationer och rutiner.
* Säkerställa efterlevnad av säkerhetspolicyer och regelverk (t.ex. GDPR, ISO 27001).
* Underhålla och utveckla Access Rights Management och IAM.


**För att lyckas i rollen:**
* Flerårig erfarenhet av AD i större IT‑miljöer.
* Erfarenhet av att sätta upp eget AD.
* Kompetens inom Windows Server, DNS, DHCP, GPO och PowerShell.
* Erfarenhet av Microsoft Entra ID och hybridmiljöer är meriterande.
* Erfarenhet av IT‑säkerhet, IAM‑principer och åtkomstmodeller.
* Erfarenhet av automatisering och scriptning.
* God kommunikativ förmåga och vana av att dokumentera tekniska lösningar.


**Personliga egenskaper**
* Strukturerad och noggrann.
* Säkerhetsmedveten och ansvarstagande.
* Analytisk problemlösare.
* Självständig men trivs även med nära samarbete i team.


**Varför jobba hos oss?**
 Här får du möjligheten att påverka och utveckla en central del av vår IT‑infrastruktur. Vi erbjuder en modern teknisk miljö, högt säkerhetsfokus och möjligheten att driva förändring inom identitets- och åtkomsthantering. Du kommer in i ett engagerat team med stort kompetensutbyte och goda utvecklingsmöjligheter.
   

  

**Varför Telia Cygate?**
 På Telia Cygate är vi inte bara experter på nätverk, säkerhet och olika slags moln – vi är också ett gäng som tycker att det ska vara kul att gå till jobbet! Som en del av Telia Company har vi styrkan att skapa verklig påverkan i stor skala, bidra till samhällsnytta och hjälpa våra kunder att navigera i digitaliseringens värld. Vi gör det alltid med värme, omtanke och ett leende. Här är det idéerna och våra olika perspektiv som gör oss starka, och tillsammans ser vi till att teknikens värld blir en plats där alla trivs – och där du hör hemma.
   

  

 Hos oss är din utveckling viktig. Vi uppmuntrar till kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och ser till att just du och dina intressen är i fokus. Vi vet att det är människorna som utgör vårt företag, och därför värdesätter vi glädje, kreativitet och olika perspektiv i allt vi gör.
   

  

 Välkommen att växa tillsammans med oss, där vi gör teknik mänsklig och skapar verklig påverkan
 **!**
**Telia Cygate är stolta över att vara certifierade som Great Place to Work!**
 Hos oss står människor i centrum – här får du utvecklas, utmanas och trivas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor. Vi bygger en kultur där trygghet, gemenskap och möjligheter går hand i hand. Vill du vara med på resan? Välkommen till en arbetsplats som verkligen gör skäl för namnet.
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder**
 När du börjar hos oss får du ett omfattande förmånspaket anpassat efter din lokala marknad, möjlighet till hybridarbete och mer. Du har också chans att få bonus baserat på din prestation och Telias resultat.
   

  

**Låter det intressant?**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan senast
 **2026-04-12.** 
 Rollen kan komma att stängas tidigare om vi hittar rätt kandidat – så vänta inte för länge!
   

  

 Placeringsort: Solna, Karlstad, Malmö, Örebro eller Växjö
   

  

 Om du går vidare i processen kommer du att kontaktas av vår
 **Talent Acquisition Partner** 
 . Bakgrund- och referenskontroller ingår i processen.
   

  

 Vill du veta mer om rollen? Kontakta gärna Petra Peric på petra.peric@cygate.se
   

  

 I samband med våra rekryteringar undanber vi oss kontakter från rekryteringsföretag och andra annonsörer.
   

  

**Lika möjligheter för alla**
 På Telia värderar vi kompetens och utvecklingspotential. Vi främjar mångfald och ser till att varje individs behov tillgodoses, oavsett funktionsvariation, kön, ålder, nationalitet, sexuell läggning eller social bakgrund. Tillsammans skapar vi en inkluderande arbetsmiljö där din unikhet är vår styrka.
   

  

**Välkommen till Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Summer Sanian Intern
description:
**Your work days are brighter here.**
 We’re obsessed with making hard work pay off, for our people, our customers, and the world around us. As a Fortune 500 company and a leading AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, we’re shaping the future of work so teams can reach their potential and focus on what matters most. The minute you join, you’ll feel it. Not just in the products we build, but in how we show up for each other. Our culture is rooted in integrity, empathy, and shared enthusiasm. We’re in this together, tackling big challenges with bold ideas and genuine care. We look for curious minds and courageous collaborators who bring sun-drenched optimism and drive. Whether you're building smarter solutions, supporting customers, or creating a space where everyone belongs, you’ll do meaningful work with Workmates who’ve got your back. In return, we’ll give you the trust to take risks, the tools to grow, the skills to develop and the support of a company invested in you for the long haul. So, if you want to inspire a brighter work day for everyone, including yourself, you’ve found a match in Workday, and we hope to be a match for you too.
   

  

**About The Team**
 Help shape AI's future alongside brilliant minds from Notion, Dropbox, Slack, Databricks, Google, McKinsey, and BCG.
   

  

* Competitive salary and compensation package
* Swift professional growth in an evolving environment, supported by a culture of continuous feedback and mentorship from senior leaders.
* Work with talented teammates across 5+ countries, and collaborate with customers globally
* Regular team gatherings and events (recently in Italy and South Africa)


**About The Role**
 As a summer Sanian, you'll be part of a dynamic team. Whether you're in Operations, Marketing, Customer Success, Go-to-Market, your role will involve identifying emerging market needs and trends, and understanding how Sana can address the challenges faced by leading global organizations. You'll help shape the future strategies and structures within your team, focusing on expanding into new markets, supporting strategic initiatives, and developing the tools and processes that enable Sana to scale effectively.
   

  

**About You**
* Currently completing final year of university, or entering final year of university.
* Speak fluent English, and preferably one more European/Nordic language.
* Possess entrepreneurial spirit and adaptability, alongside a relentless determination to deliver and achieve targets.
* Passion about workforce efficiencies and deeply committed to continuous learning and development.
* A humble and curious mind.
* Enthusiasm about starting a career with Sana post-graduation.


**Our Approach to Flexible Work**
 With Flex Work, we’re combining the best of both worlds: in-person time and remote. Our approach enables our teams to deepen connections, maintain a strong community, and do their best work. We know that flexibility can take shape in many ways, so rather than a number of required days in-office each week, we simply
 **spend at least half (50%) of our time each quarter in the office or in the field** 
 with our customers, prospects, and partners (depending on role). This means you'll have the freedom to create a flexible schedule that caters to your business, team, and personal needs, while being intentional to make the most of time spent together. Those in our remote "home office" roles also have the opportunity to come together in our offices for important moments that matter.
   

  

 At Workday, we are committed to providing an accessible and inclusive hiring experience where all candidates can fully demonstrate their skills. If you require assistance or an accommodation at any point, please email accommodations@workday.com.
   

  

**Are you being referred to one of our roles? If so, ask your connection at Workday about our Employee Referral process!**
 At Workday, we value our candidates’ privacy and data security. Workday will never ask candidates to apply to jobs through websites that are not Workday Careers.
   

  

 Please be aware of sites that may ask for you to input your data in connection with a job posting that appears to be from Workday but is not.
   

  

 In addition, Workday will never ask candidates to pay a recruiting fee, or pay for consulting or coaching services, in order to apply for a job at Workday.

title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
**Senior AI Engineer role - Established product company - Stockholm 💡** 




  





 I'm working in collaboration with a well-established product company in Stockholm, who are disrupting and transforming a typically corporate, enterprise financial sector with a digital-first, user-focused web & mobile apps!
 



  





 With over 100 people in the company, 130,000 active paying customers across Sweden, they are a super stable organisation with an established product and a strong reputation. They combine a customer-first approach and cutting-edge technology to streamline, simplify and optimize everything related to insurance!
 



  





 Key features of the product and how they differ:
 



  




* Fully digital claims: Upload a voice memo, or a photo via their app - and quickly get guided through the full claims process by their team
* Tailored user experience based on your insurance needs, products etc
* Customers can cancel any time
* **Focus on AI & automation when it comes to quotes, pricing, claims - and therefore are focused on accelerating their AI strategy in 2026 to build and deploy production-grade, AI features and tools for genuine impact!**



  





**Role:** 




  





 With a tonne of new feature development ahead, and a focus on leveraging and deploying AI , they are
 **looking for a Senior software engineer with experience building and deploying AI-based tools and products, to play a pivotal role in the next phase of the company and drive their AI strategy and engineering!** 




  





 This is a product-focused engineering role rather than a purely research-driven position. The majority of your time will be spent building features, designing scalable systems, and improving the overall product experience, whilst collaborating with different product teams, senior leadership and business stakeholders to drive AI product development!
 



  





 In addition, you will contribute to AI-related initiatives by evaluating technical approaches, exploring new applications, and helping ensure AI technologies are used thoughtfully, responsibly, and effectively within the product.
 



  





 You will work within a modern, cloud-based technology environment that includes back-end services, web applications, native mobile applications, API-driven communication, and distributed systems architecture.
 



  





**You do not need deep expertise in every technology used, but you should be comfortable navigating complex systems and learning new tools and frameworks as needed.** 




  





 👋✅
 **you will:** 




  




* Design and implement high-quality product features across backend, web, and mobile platforms
* Contribute to system architecture and technical decision-making
* Improve scalability, reliability, and maintainability of distributed systems
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate product ideas into production-ready solutions
* Support the evaluation and integration of AI capabilities within the product
* Help define best practices for responsible and effective use of AI technologies



  





 🛠️💡
 **Responsibilities** 




  




* Develop and maintain backend services within a microservices architecture
* Build and enhance web and mobile application features
* Contribute to API design and system integration
* Participate in architectural discussions and technical planning
* Explore and evaluate AI/LLM-powered solutions for real-world product use cases
* Integrate AI model APIs and design prompt-driven or automation-based features where appropriate
* Contribute to testing, evaluation, and quality assurance of AI-enabled functionality
* Write clean, maintainable, well-tested code



  





 💡💻
 **Requirements (and nice to haves!)** 




  




* 4+ years of professional experience as a software engineer
* Strong computer science fundamentals and practical system design skills
* Experience delivering high-quality production software
* Experience working with AI or LLM-powered features in real-world projects (e.g., model integrations, prompt-based workflows, automation, evaluation systems)
* Ability to navigate ambiguity and explore AI opportunities pragmatically without over-engineering
* Comfort working in modern cloud-based, distributed systems environments
* Strong collaboration and communication skills
* Customer-focused mindset with an interest in building purposeful, impactful technology
* Motivation to contribute to a culture of learning, feedback, and continuous improvement



  





 This is a permanent role in Stockholm, working on a hybrid model. Super impactful role with a tonne of autonomy and ownership, whilst being part of a warm and collaborative engineering organisation!

title: Machine Learning engineer
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.
   

  

 We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a
 **Machine Learning Engineer** 
 in our
 **Stockholm** 
 office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Machine Learning Engineer at Viaplay, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the next generation of our data-driven products and services. Working at the intersection of personalization, customer engagement, and operational intelligence, you’ll design and deploy state-of-the-art ML systems that directly impact millions of users across our platform.
   

  

 Your responsibilities will extend far beyond model development. You’ll act as a strategic partner to product, engineering, and commercial teams, translating business objectives into scalable, high-impact ML solutions. Whether enhancing our recommendation engines, uncovering deep user insights, or enabling smarter decision-making across the organization, your work will be central to Viaplay’s continued growth and innovation.
   

  

 You’ll join a high-performing, inclusive, and curious team of ML Engineers, Data Scientists, Analysts, and Data Engineers. Together, we foster a culture of experimentation, shared ownership, and technical excellence. Our recommender system already powers engaging user experiences, and we’re only at the beginning of our machine learning journey.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Design, develop, and deploy scalable machine learning models for recommendation, prediction, and classification use cases.
* Own and lead end-to-end ML initiatives, from ideation and stakeholder alignment to development, deployment, and ongoing performance evaluation.
* Translate business needs into structured ML problems and deliver measurable, impactful outcomes.
* Build robust, production-ready pipelines and monitor ML systems in a cloud-native environment.
* Conduct advanced statistical analyses to uncover trends in user behavior, content performance, and platform engagement.
* Collaborate closely with product, engineering, content, commercial, and marketing teams to drive data-informed decision-making.
* Contribute to a culture of experimentation, innovation, and continuous learning within the data team.


**What We’re Looking For**
 We're seeking someone who combines technical depth with strategic thinking and a curious, problem-solving mindset.
   

  

 We understand you may feel confident ticking certain boxes more than others and that’s why we always keep an open mind in our recruitment process. But, in order to thrive in this role, we do believe you’ll have at least some experience in the following:
   

  

* Proven experience leading ML projects end-to-end, from problem definition and stakeholder alignment to deployment and monitoring in production.
* Expertise in one or more ML domains such as LLMs, NLP, recommendation systems, or reinforcement learning.
* Ability to build ML solutions that are scalable, robust, and explainable, not just performant in isolation.
* Strong experience deploying ML models in cloud environments (preferably AWS) and using containerization tools like Docker .
* Familiarity with orchestration tools such as Airflow for reliable ML pipeline execution and monitoring
* Solid software engineering fundamentals.
* 5+ years of hands-on experience in applied Machine Learning within production environments.
* Strong academic background in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field.


**It’s a bonus if you have:** 
  

  

* Experience with recommender systems, personalization, or content optimization — ideally in media, streaming, or e-commerce.
* Familiarity with MLOps practices, including CI/CD for ML, model monitoring, and production observability.
* Exposure to real-time or near-real-time ML architectures and streaming data systems.


 What we offer you
   

  

* We’ve got you covered! 30 days of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
* Your wellbeing matters. We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
* Flexibility that works. We follow a hybrid model with at least three days a week in the office, giving you the best mix of collaboration and focus time.
* A safe space to grow and up-skill. Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
* An innovative environment with Hack Days once a year. This week-long initiative allows you to think outside the box and deliver creative, technical solutions that (more often than not) go on to be implemented, either in our product or our ways of working.
* Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do. So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including serier & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.


**Hit play today**
 If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position.
   

  

 Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

title: Data Engineer
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.
   

  

 We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a
 **Data Engineer** 
 in our
 **Stockholm office** 
 – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?
   

  

 The role
   

  

 The Ad Platform Solutions team sits within Viaplay Digital Ad Product, bridging commercial priorities and technical delivery in Viaplay. You will be joining a small, growing team where your work connects directly to how the sales organisation operates every day.
   

  

 As our new Data Engineer, you will play a central role in developing and improving the data infrastructure that powers ad sales across all Viaplay markets. We’ve built a solid foundation that supports our operations today, and we’re now looking for someone to take ownership of it - improving and strengthening what’s already in place, while also influencing architecture and shaping how the platform evolves.
   

  

**Role**
 This is a hands-on engineering role. In a small team, you will work across the full data lifecycle - from pipeline development and orchestration to data modelling, ensuring the right data reaches the right people. Your day-to-day will include:
   

  

* Building and maintaining data pipelines that power ad sales reporting and operations across Sweden, Norway, and Denmark
* Structuring and modelling data so it is clean, consistent, and genuinely useful to the business
* Identifying and resolving issues in existing pipelines, reducing manual work and improving reliability
* Translating needs from stakeholders into solid technical solutions
* Contributing to architectural decisions as the platform evolves


 We actively use AI-assisted tools as part of our development workflow to improve efficiency and speed up delivery. We expect engineers to use these tools effectively, while critically evaluating outputs and maintaining full ownership of the systems they build.
   

  

 What we’re looking for
   

  

 We understand you may feel confident ticking certain boxes more than others and that’s why we always keep an open mind in our recruitment process. But, in order to thrive in this role, we do believe you’ll have at least some experience in the following:
   

  

* Solid, production-level data engineering experience - you have done this before and know what good looks like
* Strong skills in Python and/or C#, with confident SQL and hands-on database experience, relational databases such as SQL Server and PostgreSQL.
* Experience working with cloud-based data platforms, particularly in Azure environments.
* Experience building and maintaining data pipelines using orchestration tools (such as Airflow or Meltano), along with a solid understanding of data warehouse principles (e.g. dimensional modelling, data quality, and performance optimisation)
* Experience using AI-assisted coding tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot, Claude) in a development workflow
* Comfortable working autonomously in a small team, with a strong sense of ownership and the ability to drive work forward without much hand-holding


**It’s a bonus if you have:** 
  

  

* Experience with ad sales, digital advertising data, or media industry systems
* A can-do attitude, sense of humor and the ability to work humbly with others.


 What we offer you
   

  

**We’ve got you covered! 30 days** 
 of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
   

  

**Your wellbeing matters.** 
 We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
   

  

**A safe space to grow and up-skill.** 
 Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
   

  

**Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do** 
 . So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including series & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.
   

  

 Hit play today
   

  

 If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position.
   

  

 Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

title: Konsult inom fastighetsförvaltning och digitalisering
description:
**Är du nyfiken på hur digitalisering, arbetssätt och systemstöd kan utveckla fastighetsförvaltning? Har du ett intresse för PropTech och vill bidra i uppdrag där struktur och förändring möts?** 



  


 Då kan du vara den vi söker! Nu rekryterar Svefa en konsult inom förvaltningsrådgivning till vårt kontor i Stockholm. Här får du kliva in i en utvecklande roll nära kunder, med stöd av erfarna kollegor och möjlighet att successivt ta större ansvar.
 


  


 Hos oss arbetar du med frågor kopplade till digitalisering, effektivisering och utveckling av fastighetsförvaltning. Det här jobbet passar dig som har erfarenhet inom förvaltning, systemstöd eller implementering - kanske jobbar du i dagsläget som projektledare hos en systemleverantör, som förvaltare eller driftcontroller och är nyfiken på nästa steg?
 


  


*Läs mer i annonsen och vänta inte med att skicka in din ansökan!* 



  

  

 ✨ Det här erbjuder vi dig
   

  
* En utvecklande roll där du får arbeta i projekt inom digitalisering och förändring
  
* Möjlighet att bredda din kompetens inom både förvaltning, processer och systemstöd
  
* Ett team med hög kompetens där vi stöttar varandra och delar erfarenheter
  
* En kultur präglad av engagemang, samarbete och vilja att skapa verklig nytta
  
* Ett centralt kontor i Stockholm med kunniga kollegor inom fastighetsrådgivning
  


  

  

 🛠️ Det här kommer du göra
   


 Vi ger rådgivning till kunder som vill utveckla sin fastighetsförvaltning, med särskilt fokus på digitalisering. I den här rollen kommer du in i uppdrag tillsammans med seniora kollegor och växer successivt in i konsultansvaret.
 


  


 I uppdragen arbetar vi både strategiskt och operativt: ibland i ett helikopterperspektiv där vi guidar kunder i hur deras digitala verktyg och arbetssätt kan utvecklas och ibland mer hands-on i detaljer kopplade till system, processer och arbetssätt.
 


  


 Du kommer bland annat att:
 


  

  
* Bidra i kunduppdrag där digitalisering, arbetssätt, processer och systemstöd möts
  
* Medverka i analyser, nulägeskartläggningar och utveckling av framtida arbetssätt
  
* Stötta kunddialoger, workshops och framtagande av besluts- och arbetsunderlag
  
* Driva delmoment i uppdrag, med stöd av seniora kollegor
  
* På sikt ta större ansvar i leveranser och kundrelationer
  


  

  

 📌 Mer om jobbet
   


 Du blir en del av ett kunnigt team i Stockholm, där vi sitter i fina lokaler mitt i city. Här får du möjlighet att utvecklas i konsultrollen, arbeta nära affären och vara med och påverka hur branschen utvecklas framåt.
 


  


 Vi är ett team på 16 personer som alla utgår från Stockholm. Tjänsten är på heltid och start sker efter överenskommelse.
 


  

  

 👤 Det här söker vi
   


 Vi söker dig som har ett genuint intresse för hur digitalisering och systemstöd kan utveckla fastighetsförvaltning.
 


  


**Formellt ser vi att du:** 



  

  
* Har en högskoleutbildning inom exempelvis fastighet, ekonomi, teknik eller IT
  
* Har något eller ett par års erfarenhet av fastighetsförvaltning eller systemrelaterade roller
  
* Gärna har erfarenhet av projektledning eller förändringsarbete (meriterande, inget krav)
  


  


**Som person tror vi att du:** 



  

  
* Trivs med att strukturera, utveckla och ta fram rutiner
  
* Är kommunikativ och gillar att samarbeta med olika typer av roller
  
* Är nyfiken och vill utvecklas vidare
  


  

  

 📩 Är du intresserad?
   


 Vad roligt! Skicka in din ansökan i form av CV och en kort motivation.
 


  


 För frågor, kontakta:
 


  

  
* **Henrik Engqvist, affärschef** 
 – 010-603 87 39, henrik.engqvist@svefa.se
  
* **Julia Wengse, HR-specialist** 
 – 010-603 87 42, julia.wengse@svefa.se
  


  


 Vi arbetar med löpande urval och behandlar alla ansökningar konfidentiellt. Slutkandidater genomgår tester i samarbete med AON samt bakgrundskontroll.

title: Resande onsite-tekniker
description:
Vi söker dig som trivs i en självständig onsite-roll där du samtidigt är en del av ett team. Rollen har ett nationellt ansvar och omfattar hela Sverige, med bas i Stockholm, och innebär ett något mer tekniskt uppdrag med ett bredare IT‑perspektiv.
   

  

 Du har ett tydligt servicefokus och ansvarar för att stötta kollegor både på huvudkontoret i Stockholm och i företagets butiker och deras dagliga IT‑miljö. Rollen är varierad och kombinerar onsite‑arbete ute i verksamheten med remote‑support mellan fältinsatserna. Arbetet inkluderar några resor runt om i Sverige några gånger per månad.
   

  

**I Rollen Kommer Du Bland Annat Att**
* stötta vid öppning av nya butiker
* delta i migrering av nyförvärvade verksamheter till företagets IT‑miljö
* sätta upp och konfigurera IT‑utrustning, nätverk och trådlösa accesspunkter
* ge onsite‑stöd när butiker går live
* arbeta med remote‑support mellan fältinsatser och projekt


 Du arbetar hands‑on med support av bland annat datorer, mötesrum, nätverk och WiFi, i en Windows‑miljö, med daglig ärendehantering i ServiceNow. Du samarbetar nära den lokala IT‑driften för att säkerställa hög tillgänglighet och snabbt åtgärda IT‑relaterade problem.
   

  

 Ett starkt servicetänk är den främsta egenskapen i rollen, kombinerat med grundläggande IT‑kunskaper och en vilja att hjälpa användare på ett professionellt och lösningsorienterat sätt.
   

  

**DIN PROFIL**
**Vi Tror Att Du**
* har minst två års erfarenhet som onsite‑tekniker
* har goda kunskaper om datorer, kringutrustning och operativsystem
* har erfarenhet av Active Directory
* har arbetat med enklare felsökning av nätverk/WIFI, laptops och skrivare
* har erfarenhet av ärendehanteringssystem och dokumentation
* är van vid att installera applikationer och ansluta olika typer av enheter
* är bekant med Microsoft Office 365, OneDrive och Microsoft Teams
* är flytande i svenska, både i tal och skrift
* har B‑körkort (krav)


 Som person är du serviceinriktad, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad. Du tar eget ansvar för dina uppgifter, men trivs också med att samarbeta och bidra till teamets gemensamma mål.
   

  

**OM WISE IT**
 Wise IT är specialister på rekrytering, konsultlösningar och strategisk kompetensmatchning inom IT och tech. Teknik förändras snabbt , men med rätt person på rätt plats får du kontroll på framtiden. Vi matchar människor med skarp teknisk kompetens och förmågan att förstå helheten. Resultatet? IT som fungerar i praktiken, inte bara i teorin. Vi ser till att du inte bara följer utvecklingen utan driver den.
   

  

**NÄR DU BLIR EN AV OSS**
 Som konsult hos Wise blir du en del av ett sammanhang där vi värdesätter både din trygghet och din utveckling. Vi erbjuder marknadsmässig lön, friskvårdsbidrag, pensionsavsättning och kollektivavtal – för oss är inget viktigare än att du känner dig trygg i din anställning.
   

  

 Från dag ett på ditt konsultuppdrag får du möjlighet att utvecklas, utmanas och påverka framtidens arbetsplatser – tillsammans med engagerade kollegor, och med oss som ständigt bollplank. Oavsett var du befinner dig i karriären ska rollen som konsult ge dig erfarenheter, kunskaper och inspiration inför nästa steg.
   

  

 Välkommen till Wise – en värld full av möjligheter!
   

  

**DIN ANSÖKAN // TALENT SPEAKS LOUDER**
 För att söka rollen klicka på ”Ansök nu”, samt bifoga CV. Notera att vi ej kan ta emot ansökningar via mail. I konsultvärden går det ofta snabbt så tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum, vänta därför inte med din ansökan
   

  

 Har du frågor om rollen är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig Hanna Jalex (hanna.jalex@wise.se)

title: Säljande konsultchef till Wise IT
description:
Wise IT arbetar med rekrytering av IT-specialister, flexibla konsultlösningar och strategisk rådgivning – tre delar av samma helhet. Tillsammans gör vi det möjligt att snabbt täcka kritiska kompetensbehov och samtidigt bygga en robust och framtidssäkrad IT-organisation.
   

  

 Nu söker vi en säljande konsultchef till vårt affärsområde IT-en roll för dig som vill kombinera affärsdriv, försäljning och relationsbyggande med ett coachande ledarskap till dina konsulter? Triggas du av att skapa nya affärer, utveckla kunder och samtidigt vara en trygg partner för konsulter i deras karriär? Då kan det här vara nästa steg för dig.
   

  

**OM ROLLEN**
 I rollen som konsultchef äger du din affär fullt ut. Du driver försäljning, utvecklar kundrelationer och säkerställer leverans med tydligt affärsfokus. Du trivs i ett högt tempo, tar ansvar för resultat och kombinerar det med att generöst stötta kollegor i deras uppdrag.
   

  

 Du vågar utmana kundens behovsbild, tänka nytt och agera rådgivande i dialogen. Genom samarbete över affärsområden inom Wise IT skapar du långsiktiga relationer och nya affärsmöjligheter – både hos befintliga och nya kunder.
   

  

 Parallellt leder och utvecklar du dina konsulter genom ett engagerat och förtroendeingivande ledarskap. Förhandling och komplexa samtal är en naturlig del av rollen, och något du hanterar med trygghet och professionalism. Du gillar att vara nära både affären och människorna – i kundmöten, nätverk och sammanhang där relationer byggs på riktigt.
   

  

**DIN PROFIL**
 Du är affärsdriven, trygg i dig själv och trivs med att arbeta mot tydliga mål. Du är professionell i ditt bemötande, har lätt för att skapa förtroende och motiveras av att göra skillnad – både för kund, konsult och kollegor. Du arbetar strukturerat, har god prioriteringsförmåga och kommunicerar obehindrat i både tal och skrift.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har:**
* Erfarenhet av försäljning och affärsansvar
* Bakgrund från konsult- och/eller rekryteringsverksamhet
* Vana att bygga och utveckla långsiktiga kundrelationer
* Erfarenhet av att leda, coacha eller utveckla människor
* Trygghet i förhandling och svårare dialoger
* God kommunikativ förmåga på svenska och engelska
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt i ett högt tempo
* Erfarenhet av IT rekrytering och förståelse för kompetensmarknaden


 Som person är du nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och har ett starkt samarbetsfokus. Du bidrar med energi, engagemang och ett prestigelöst förhållningssätt – och har gärna nära till skratt.
   

  

**OM ORGANISATIONEN**
 Wise har i över 20 är var en vägledande kraft på en arbetsmarknad i ständig förändring. Vi arbetar med rekrytering, konsultlösningar och strategisk rådgivning – men vår roll är större än så. Vi bygger broar mellan kompetens och möjligheter, mellan individer och organisationer, mellan nu och framtid.
   

  

 Med expertis, insikt och mod hjälper vi företag att fatta bättre beslut om kompetens och människor att nå sin fulla potential i arbetslivet.
   

  

 Vi är specialister, inte generalister. Djupet i vår kunskap, kombinerat med bredden i vårt erbjudande, gör oss till en unik partner för alla som vill växa – på riktigt.
   

  

**DIN ANSÖKAN**
 Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mail, utan du söker enkelt med ditt CV eller din LinkedIn-profil på wise.se. Vi använder kompetensbaserad rekrytering som metod. Det gör vi i vår strävan efter en mer potentialbaserad matchning. Vi ser därför gärna sökanden med olika bakgrunder, åldrar och erfarenheter, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och gör oss bättre och smartare som organisation.
   

  

 Har du frågor om processen eller rollen? Kontakta då ansvarig rekryterande chef Anne Eklöf anne.eklof@wise.se Vi intervjuar löpande vilket innebär att rollen kan tillsättas före sista ansökningsdatum.

title: DevOps Specialist
description:
Är du en erfaren DevOps Engineer med fokus på automation, stabil drift och moderna infrastrukturlösningar? Vi söker nu en senior DevOps-specialist till en tekniktung och utvecklingsorienterad miljö där du får arbeta med plattformar som används av hela organisationen.
   

  

****Om rollen****
 Som DevOps Engineer jobbar du nära både utveckling och drift. Du är med och bygger, förbättrar och underhåller plattformar och leveransflöden. Målet är att skapa en stabil, säker och effektiv IT-miljö – både i molnet och on-prem.
   

  

 Du trivs i en roll där du kan påverka, förbättra och automatisera vardagen tillsammans med andra tekniska kollegor.
   

  

****Arbetsuppgifter:****
* Designa, drifta och vidareutveckla plattformar i hybrid- och molnmiljöer (t.ex. Azure, Kubernetes/OKD, VMware)
* Automatisera och standardisera infrastruktur med Terraform, Ansible och/eller Bicep
* Utveckla och underhålla CI/CD-pipelines (GitLab, GitHub, Git)
* Skripta för att effektivisera processer (Python, Bash eller PowerShell)
* Övervaka, felsöka och förbättra stabilitet och prestanda (Prometheus, ELK, Azure Monitor)
* Delta i change-, release- och incidenthantering enligt etablerade rutiner
* Arbeta tillsammans med utvecklare, arkitekter, driftteam och leverantörer


****Teknisk miljö:****
**Operativsystem & nätverk:** 
 Linux, Windows Server, TCP/IP, DNS
   

  

**Moln & plattformar:** 
 Azure, Kubernetes, OKD, Docker, VMware
   

  

**Automation & CI/CD:** 
 Terraform, Ansible, Bicep, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions
   

  

**Skript:** 
 Python, Bash, PowerShell, Go
   

  

**Övervakning & loggning:** 
 Prometheus, ELK-stack, Azure Monitor
   

  

**Säkerhet:** 
 SSO/SCIM, systemhärdning, Zero Trust-tänk
   

  

****Vi söker dig som:****
* Har minst 5 års erfarenhet inom DevOps eller IT-infrastruktur
* Har arbetat med IaC och CI/CD som en naturlig del av ditt arbete
* Har god förståelse för containerplattformar och molnmiljöer
* Är nyfiken, självgående och gillar att samarbeta med andra
* Talar och skriver svenska och engelska obehindrat


****Meriterande:****
 Certifieringar inom Azure/DevOps, erfarenhet av GCP/AWS eller fördjupning inom IT-säkerhet.
   

  

****Om CONSULTING it:****
 När du börjar hos oss som konsult på CONSULTING it blir du en del av vår gemenskap. Du får dessutom kollegor runt om i Sverige! Du har en dedikerad konsultchef som stöttar dig och din utveckling. Vi hjälper dig hitta nya vägar genom att prova på nya roller och nya branscher, för oss är det viktigt att du trivs på din arbetsplats. Vi ser till att du hamnar på ett bra bolag under ditt uppdrag och att uppdragen ligger i linje med hur du vill utvecklas framöver. Oavsett vad det blir, står vi bakom dig hela vägen – i ditt nästa, nästa och nästa steg. Gå med i vårt team och ta del av en spännande och utvecklande arbetsmiljö!

title: People Technology Analyst | Workday | EMEA 12 Month Fixed Term Contract
description:
Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with Grafana Cloud or self-managed with the Grafana Enterprise Stack, both featuring scalable metrics (Grafana Mimir), logs (Grafana Loki), and traces (Grafana Tempo).
   

  

 We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.
   

  

 You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.
   

  

 The Workday Analyst is responsible for the configuration and support of our Workday platform including: HCM, Absence, Global Benefits, Talent & Performance, Advanced Compensation, and Journeys.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Support system users, troubleshooting issues, and providing timely resolution, leveraging Workday Community/support to resolve complex escalation points. You will be the point person to answer questions and help enable teams.
* Build and maintain custom reports, tools and analytics to meet team needs. You will be well versed in the different reporting types (Advanced, Matrix, Transposed, etc), calculated fields, prompts, and filters.
* Lead Workday enhancement and optimization projects through completion.
* Configure and maintain Workday business processes including routing, approvals, notifications, and condition rules.
* Support Workday bi-annual releases by reviewing release notes, performing impact analysis, coordinating testing, and implementing relevant feature updates.
* Configure and maintain security roles and permissions to ensure data protection and privacy.
* Create Inbound EIB templates and mass loading data for recurring tasks and as needed.
* Create change management documentation and training to support cross functional teams on new features.


**What We’re Looking For**
* 1-2 years+ experience configuring and supporting Workday HCM (ideal candidates will have experience supporting several of these additional modules: Absence, Global Benefits, Talent & Performance, Advanced Compensation, and Journeys.).
* Experience in a high-growth startup environment with constant change as your companion.
* A passion for being organized, with incredibly strong project management skills. You will need to be detail oriented, love multi-tasking and have excellent follow through skills.
* A customer service, highly-approachable role ensuring that everyone, locally and internationally, views you as a “go to” person.
* Excellent communication in all channels (in person, online, in writing) and are able to form strong working relationships both in person and virtually.
* Strong analytical skills, with the ability to create custom reports, use complex spreadsheet formulas and analyze data in order to draw conclusions and make recommendations.
* You will be process oriented and enjoy creating process and structure where there may be ambiguity and be skilled at finding creative solutions to non-obvious problems.
* You will also be in the detail and happy to own your administrative tasks through to completion.


**Compensation & Rewards**
* In the Sweden, the annual compensation range for this role is 480,000 - 576,000 SEK. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed in the interview process.
* Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.


**Why You’ll Thrive At Grafana Labs**
* 100% Remote, Global Culture - As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* Scaling Organization – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* Transparent Communication – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* Innovation-Driven – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* Open Source Roots – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* Empowered Teams – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* Career Growth Pathways – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* Approachable Leadership – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* Passionate People – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* In-Person onboarding - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* Balance is Key - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. \*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 
 We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.
   

  

*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*
*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our privacy policy.*

title: Frukostkock sökes
description:
🥐
 **Vi söker frukostkock!**
 Är du morgonpigg, noggrann och brinner för att ge gäster en riktigt bra start på dagen? Då kan det här vara något för dig!
   

  

**Vi söker nu en frukostkock** 
 för arbete
 **helger och vid behov** 
 .
   

  

**Vi erbjuder:**
 – Ett härligt team och bra arbetsmiljö
   

  

 – Möjlighet att utvecklas i köket
   

  

 – Flexibla arbetstider
   

  

**Vi söker dig som:**
 – Har erfarenhet av frukost/servering i kök
   

  

 – Är självgående och organiserad
   

  

 – Har ett öga för detaljer och presentation
   

  

 – Är flexibel och kan hoppa in vid behov
   

  

 Låter det intressant?
   

  

 Skicka din ansökan eller hör av dig för mer information!
   

  

**BWH Hotels Scandinavia – local gems everywhere in Scandinavia**
 We are Scandinavia’s largest collective group of family- and privately-owned hotels. We are a large and quite diverse family, with many different personalities and offerings, but at our core we all share the same belief. The belief in genuine hospitality.
   

  

 Through knowledge and commitment, we ensure an experience of high quality. We are professional, with a colourful and personal tone. We believe in teamwork, why we find it important that we work together to challenge the hotel industry. You will be a part of a unique hotel chain, where we offer more personalized experiences for all our guests in Scandinavia.
   

  

 BWH Hotels is a leading, global hotel chain consisting of three hotel groups, Best Western Hotels & Resorts, WorldHotels and Sure Hotel Group. There are approximately 4,300 hotels worldwide and in Scandinavia there are over 170 hotels spread across more than 100 destinations.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
**Do you want to be at the forefront of protecting our society against cyber threats? We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to team up with the most dedicated team of developers in our Engineering Team.**
**About Truesec – A Leading Cybersecurity Company**
 Since 2005, Truesec has been a native cybersecurity company, driven by one single purpose: Creating safety and sustainability in a digital world by preventing cyber breach and minimizing impact.
   

  

 Over the years, we’ve earned the trust of organizations worldwide and gained a strong reputation internationally. Our team consists of dedicated specialists covering the entire spectrum of cybersecurity – with capabilities in Predict, Prevent, Protect, Respond, and Recover.
   

  

 Today, we employ around 350 employees – and as cybercrime grows, we need to grow. To support that goal, we are now looking for a Senior Backend Engineer who wants to make a difference in our Truesec Engineering Team.
   

  

**Truesec Technology Organization**
 This technology business unit at Truesec brings together highly skilled engineers, architects, platform specialists and IT specialist with a mission to develop, operate, and continuously improve our unified Truesec Platform and technical capabilities. The Engineering Team drives the adoption of AI, automation, and advanced technology across all business units, ensuring we deliver best-in-class cybersecurity solutions to our clients and maintain a robust, scalable, and secure technology stack.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Senior Backend Engineer, you will be integral to the Truesec engineering team, responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining the backend infrastructure of our internal tools and platform. You will create scalable and secure backend solutions that meet performance requirements while collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration with frontend components. Your role involves optimizing performance, documenting technical specifications, and mentoring other team members.
   

  

**Your Potential Background**
* Experience: Extensive experience in a similar role.
* Technical Skills: Proficient in Python and C#, with strong knowledge of object-oriented programming. Experience with relational (SQL) and NoSQL databases, API development, and backend frameworks such as ASP .Net Core.
* Cloud Proficiency: Familiarity with Azure services, including Azure App Services, Functions, and SQL Database.
* Version Control: Skilled in using Git for version control, including branching and merging.
* Agile Methodologies: Experience working in Agile teams and facilitating agile ceremonies.


**Required Skills:**
* Strong understanding of database management, including design and query optimization.
* Experience in designing and securing RESTful APIs, including authentication mechanisms (e.g., JWT, OAuth).
* Proficiency in testing frameworks (e.g., xUnit) and debugging tools.
* Ability to create clean, maintainable code while adhering to best practices and coding standards.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a focus on performance optimization and security best practices.


**Bonus Skills:**
* Experience with API documentation and creating architecture diagrams.
* Knowledge of security principles and practices, including data encryption and protection against common threats.
* Ability to facilitate team meetings and agile ceremonies effectively.
* A proactive attitude towards continuous learning and sharing knowledge with team members.
* Experience with AI and automation in business-critical environments


***Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit.***
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future**
 If you truly want to make a difference and make our world a little bit safer, this is the place for you. At Truesec, you'll get to be at the forefront of fighting cybercrime instead of reading about it in the news. This is your chance to be part of an exciting journey in a leading cybersecurity company - and learn from some of the best in their field.
   

  

 So, are you ready to team up with the most dedicated team of experts and be part of a meaningful mission? Then we are excited to get to know you!

title: Part-time Customer Service Agent
description:
**Job Advertisement from Hyre AB - Part-time Customer Service Agent** 




  





**Anställningsform:** 

  Part-time
 




**Plats:** 

  Stockholm, remote
 




**Ansökningsfrist:** 

  snarast
 




**Ansökan och frågor:** 

 jacob@hyre.dk
 




  





**Job Description** 




 Part-time position as a customer service agent at Hyre's customer service department. 
 


* We are looking for employees that can work during evenings, weekends and holidays. Being able to work during daytime hours is a
 **big plus.**
* Our agents assist customers, in the Nordics (Sweden, Denmark, Norway), who reach out to us via phone, chat, and email with inquiries or need for help. Additionally, our customer service monitors some of the warning systems Hyre uses to ensure our cars are functioning properly.
* **The position** 
 corresponds to around 1-2 shifts per week, primarily during evenings, weekends and holidays. One shift is 8 hours.
* This position is highly flexible, as you only need a mobile phone and a computer to perform the work, and you can currently work from wherever you want.
 **Note** 
 :
 **you need to be in possession of your own laptop.**



  





**Who are you?** 



* You live in Stockholm
* You have excellent communication skills in both Swedish and English, written and spoken
* Knowledge of Norwegian and/or Danish is a great advantage
* You keep a cool head and manage to maintain a friendly and professional tone in all situations
* You are structured, self-driven, and detail-oriented
* You enjoy interacting with people and love solving problems
* You have solid IT skills and are comfortable using MS Office and digital tools
* You can handle multiple tasks at once in an efficient and organized manner
* **You’re flexible and available to work both days, evenings, and weekends – ideally several times a week**
* You hold a Category B driver's license and preferably have basic car knowledge
* You may already have experience from customer service or other service roles – a big plus, but not a requirement
* You’re passionate about our vision of a future where no one needs to own a private car in the city



  





**What can Hyre offer?** 



* Valuable experience from a fast-growing startup in the technology and mobility sector.
* Engaged and skilled colleagues who are passionate about innovation and technology.
* A work environment with supportive colleagues, a fast-paced atmosphere, and a steep learning curve.
* Be part of a journey to redefine how people move in and out of cities.
* Great prices on car rentals.



  





**Important information and dates** 




 The recruitment process is in two stages: First a digital interview via Google Meet. Selected candidates are then invited to the second and final round, which is an in-person interview at the Stockholm office.
 



 🗓️
 *Second round interviews will be conducted on 12/5 and 13/5* 




  





 The onboarding process is three days, in-person, at the Stockholm office.
 



 🗓️
 *The onboarding will be conducted on 26/5, 27/5 + 28/5 from 09-15* 





  





**Interested?** 




 Contact Nordic 1’st Line Customer Service Manager, Jacob Chahid (Jacob@hyre.dk). When applying, attach your CV and references and write a few sentences about who you are, your availability and why you are interested in working at Hyre.
 



  





 Write your application in English. 
 



  





 -----
 



**About Hyre** 




 Hyre is the largest car-sharing service in the Nordic region with over 2500 cars in Norway, Sweden and Denmark. The company was established in 2017 and is a joint venture between Möller Mobility Group and Hyre Management. Hyre's customer service has been awarded several times for its high-quality service. 
 



  





**Our Vision** 




 Hyre wants to redefine how we think about individual mobility. We want to change people's perception of car ownership as the ultimate definition of freedom. We believe that a car when needed is the best solution for everyone living and working in the cities of the future – whether you drive the car yourself or it drives you. 
 



 We haven't succeeded until all friction in your journey is gone.

title: Självgående Onsite-tekniker
description:
Vi söker dig som är engagerad och trivs i en självständig IT‑supportroll där du samtidigt är en del av ett team. I rollen har du ett tydligt servicefokus och ansvarar för att stötta kollegor på huvudkontoret samt i kundens butiker och deras dagliga IT‑miljö.
   

  

 Du arbetar hands‑on med support av bland annat datorer, mötesrum, nätverk och WiFi, både på plats och via ärendehanteringssystem. Rollen innebär arbete i en Windows‑miljö och daglig hantering av ärenden i ServiceNow.
   

  

 Du samarbetar nära med den lokala IT‑driften för att säkerställa hög tillgänglighet och snabbt åtgärda IT‑relaterade problem. Ett starkt servicetänk är den viktigaste egenskapen i rollen, kombinerat med grundläggande IT‑kunskaper och en vilja att hjälpa användare på ett professionellt och lösningsorienterat sätt.
   

  

**DIN PROFIL**
**Vi Tror Att Du**
* Har minst två års erfarenhet från arbete inom servicedesk eller som onsite‑tekniker
* Har arbetat med On- och offboardingprocesser
* Har arbetat med enklare felsökning av nätverk/WIFI, laptops och skrivare
* Har erfarenhet av ärendehanteringssystem och dokumentation
* Har goda kunskaper om datorer, kringutrustning och operativsystem
* Har erfarenhet av Active Directory
* Är van vid att installera applikationer och ansluta olika typer av enheter
* Är bekant med Microsoft Office 365, OneDrive och Microsoft Teams
* Är flytande i svenska, både i tal och skrift
* Har B-körkort (meriterande)


 Som person är du serviceinriktad, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad. Du tar eget ansvar för dina uppgifter, men trivs också med att samarbeta och bidra till teamets gemensamma mål
   

  

**OM WISE IT**
 Wise IT är specialister på rekrytering, konsultlösningar och strategisk kompetensmatchning inom IT och tech. Teknik förändras snabbt , men med rätt person på rätt plats får du kontroll på framtiden. Vi matchar människor med skarp teknisk kompetens och förmågan att förstå helheten. Resultatet? IT som fungerar i praktiken, inte bara i teorin. Vi ser till att du inte bara följer utvecklingen utan driver den
   

  

**NÄR DU BLIR EN AV OSS**
 Som konsult hos Wise blir du en del av ett sammanhang där vi värdesätter både din trygghet och din utveckling. Vi erbjuder marknadsmässig lön, friskvårdsbidrag, pensionsavsättning och kollektivavtal – för oss är inget viktigare än att du känner dig trygg i din anställning.
   

  

 Från dag ett på ditt konsultuppdrag får du möjlighet att utvecklas, utmanas och påverka framtidens arbetsplatser – tillsammans med engagerade kollegor, och med oss som ständigt bollplank. Oavsett var du befinner dig i karriären ska rollen som konsult ge dig erfarenheter, kunskaper och inspiration inför nästa steg.
   

  

 Välkommen till Wise – en värld full av möjligheter!
   

  

**DIN ANSÖKAN // TALENT SPEAKS LOUDER**
 För att söka rollen klicka på ”Ansök nu”, samt bifoga CV. Notera att vi ej kan ta emot ansökningar via mail. I konsultvärden går det ofta snabbt så tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum, vänta därför inte med din ansökan.
   

  

 Har du frågor om rollen är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig Hanna Jalex (hanna.jalex@wise.se)

title: AI Platform Engineer
description:
**Job ID: 3525**
 We are looking for an AI Platform Engineer to drive the development and adoption of AI-powered solutions that strengthen our ability to detect and investigate financial crime. The role is permanent and can be based in Helsinki.
   

  

**About Our Team**
 Meet the AI & Machine Learning team. Our role is to improve how we detect and investigate financial crime with the help of AI and machine learning to keep our customers, Nordea and society safe. Our team is about 25 people working out of Stockholm, Helsinki and Copenhagen as a part of the Group Financial Crime Prevention (GFCP) unit that provides financial crime prevention services to all of the bank.
   

  

 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in how we work and how we make decisions – and that we imagine you share with us.
   

  

**Main responsibilities in this role:**
* Design and implement proof-of-concept solutions for the AI Platform spanning predictive, generative and agentic workflows.
* Secure that applications are compliant in accordance with rules and regulations.
* Define production readiness and operational governance.
* Lead technical working groups and cross-team synchronization.
* Translate strategic direction into tactical technical guidance for the teams.
* Application risk management – manage risks and QRAs.
* Application access management – access rules and requirements.
* Application cost management – ensure cost efficient applications.
* Application incident management – secure proper communication and reporting.


**Who You Are**
**This is the right role for you if you are:**
* Ambitious and enjoy bringing ideas, exploring their potential, and presenting the results. You're passionate about ensuring production excellence in machine learning operations, ensuring both the bank’s and society's safety.
* Cllaborative and thrive in cross-functional environments, comfortable working at the intersection of business and technology. You communicate clearly and confidently with both technical and non-technical audiences, and you’re comfortable driving work forward independently.


**Your background and skills include:**
* BSc or MSc in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, a relevant technical field or equivalent practical experience.
* 5+ years of experience as a Cloud native expert in designing and building production grade applications and services on AWS and other cloud providers (Azure or GCP).
* Practical experience with Python development and managing complex environments with Terraform.
* Experience working with AI/ML platforms such as Amazon SageMaker, Bedrock, AgentCore and Data platforms such as S3, AWS Glue, Lake Formation.
* Proven ability to manage complex stakeholder relationships across multiple domains, including expectations management.


**It would be ideal if you also:**
* Experience with agile methodologies and product development lifecycle.
* Ability to work cross-functionally with engineering, architecture, and data science teams.
* Have professional experience from working in regulated industries, i.e. Banking, Government, etc.


**What We Offer**
**People** 
 come here when they want to get somewhere. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

**A culture** 
 that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

**Hybrid working model –** 
 we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusion** 
 are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application as soon as possible as we start with interviews on ongoing basis. For more information, you’re welcome to contact Björn Hertzberg (bjorn.hertzberg@nordea.com), Head of Data Science in FCIIA.
   

  

 A Background Check will be performed for the person selected for this position, including internal applicants.
   

  

**We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.**
**We build relationships** 
 . We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

**We learn and develop.** 
 We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

**We lead change** 
 . We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

**We are Nordea** 
 . We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Finland:** 
 A security clearance will be performed for the person selected for this position.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Sweden:** 
 For union information, please contact Finansförbundet at finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACO at SacoNordea@nordea.com .
   

  

**Only for candidates in Poland:** 
 Please include permit for processing personal data in CV as following:
   

  

 In accordance with art. 6 (1) a and b. Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016 on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data, and repealing Directive 95/46/EC (General Data Protection Regulation) hereinafter ‘GDPR’. I agree to have: my personal data, education and employment history proceeded for the purposes of current and future recruitment processes in Nordea Bank Abp.
   

  

 The administrator of your personal data is: Nordea Bank Abp operating in Poland through its Branch, address: Aleja Edwarda Rydza Śmiglego 20, 93-281 Łodź. Your personal data will be processed for the recruitment processes in Nordea Bank Abp. You have a right to access your personal data, right to rectify and right to delete. Disclosing the personal data in the scope specified by the provisions of Polish Labour Code from 26 June 1974 and executive acts are mandatory. Providing personal data is necessary to conduct the recruitment processes. The request for the deletion of your personal data means resignation from further participation in recruitment processes and causes the immediate removal of your application. Detailed information concerning processing of your personal data can be found at: https://www.nordea.com/en/doc/nordea-privacy-policy-for-applicants.pdf
   

  

 We reserve the right to reply only to selected applications.

title: Public Sector Solution Engineer - Sweden
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

 The Solution Engineer in our Public Sector sales organization is a client facing pre-sales consultant responsible for presenting product offerings and solutions in the best light to prospects and customers to best meet their business objectives. Our Solution Engineers are able to to take complex business solutions and pieces of technology and explain them in a simple and easy to understand way.
   

  

 As SE you understand customer goals and challenges and map those back to the Salesforce product portfolio. You design, build, and demonstrate unique and innovative solutions to address these challenges, you present Salesforce technology infrastructure, including demonstrating deep familiarity with the PaaS, SaaS and Agentic AI stack.
   

  

 In addition you participate in all appropriate product, sales, technical training and certifications to acquire and maintain the knowledge necessary to be effective in the position. Attain quarterly and annual objectives defined collaboratively with management and respond effectively to RFIs/RFPs. Active participation in a fast-paced high-energy market segment and balance multiple projects in a team-selling environment.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Coordinate and lead the entire client functional and technical solution cycle in close collaboration with sales colleagues and and the rest of the SE organization.
* Understand the customer’s needs, and establish Salesforce’s product as the best solution that solves unique challenges
* Convey a deep understanding of the Public Sector industry and technology as it pertains to Salesforce’s solutions
* Develop and deliver innovative custom solutions, build and present customized demos of Salesforce products including solution concepts to key decision-makers to address their business issues and needs showing business value.
* Participate in all appropriate product, sales, and procedural training and certifications to acquire and maintain the knowledge vital to be effective in the position
* Attain quarterly and annual objectives assigned by management
* Respond efficiently to RFPs
* Have a strong curiosity about growing your career and participating in our internal training programs and mentorship initiatives.
* Required Qualifications:
* Track record of solution engineering, consultancy, or delivery in an enterprise software solution organization. We are open to a variety of backgrounds for the role.
* Be at the forefront of the AI revolution, track record of adopting AI tools, experience with Vibe Coding.
* Proven oral, written, presentation, and interpersonal communication and relationship skills.
* Proven time management skills in a dynamic team environment.
* Ability to work as part of a team to tackle problems in dynamic, energizing environments.
* Inquisitive, practical, and passionate about technology and sharing knowledge.
* Loves to be the first to know something and to understand why and how things happen.
* Good at searching out information and experimenting, love to concentrate on a particular topic, and tackle puzzles.
* Good at explaining ideas and finding ways to keep people’s attention.
* Willing and able to travel occasionally
* Degree or equivalent relevant experience required. Experience will be evaluated based on alignment to the core competencies for the role (e.g. extracurricular leadership roles, military experience, volunteer work, etc.).
* Fluency in Swedish and English and right to work in Sweden.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Understanding the business requirements of customers within multiple industries and Public Sector in particular
* Salesforce Product knowledge and certifications preferred but knowledge/experience with other CRM solutions is welcome as well
* Passionate about AI, willing to lead the charge in the Agentic AI revolution


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: ERP Solution Architect
description:
At
 **Arcwide** 
 , we are more than just a consultancy – we are a team driven by
