title: Junior Platform Engineer
description:
**Build something monumental for Healthcare!**
==============================================

  

At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.


We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!

**About the Role**
------------------


You enjoy making systems work, not just writing code, but understanding how everything fits together underneath. You’ve probably spent time tinkering on your own, setting up servers, hosting things yourself, or trying to understand how infrastructure actually behaves in the real world.


At Tandem, you’ll join a small, highly skilled platform team and help build the infrastructure that powers the future of European healthcare. You don’t need to know everything from day one - what matters most is your drive to learn, your curiosity, and your willingness to get your hands dirty.


This role is focused on infrastructure first. You’ll work closely with experienced engineers, gradually taking ownership of parts of our platform and helping the team move faster by offloading and improving core infrastructure work. Along the way, you’ll learn how to build systems that are reliable, secure, and scalable in a highly regulated environment.


If you’re someone who enjoys figuring things out, breaking and fixing systems, and continuously improving how things run - this is a great place to grow.

**What You Will Do**
--------------------

* Support the team in building and maintaining cloud infrastructure that powers Tandem’s products.
* Work with Kubernetes-based systems and help improve how services are deployed and operated.
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines, making deployments smoother and more reliable.
* Assist in implementing infrastructure-as-code using tools like Terraform and Helm.
* Help improve observability, monitoring, and alerting across our systems.
* Take ownership of smaller infrastructure components over time and help scale them.
* Work closely with senior engineers to learn best practices around reliability, security, and performance.

**What You Bring**
------------------

* Some experience working with cloud infrastructure (Azure, AWS, or GCP).
* Familiarity with Kubernetes, CI/CD, or infrastructure tooling - even if not at an expert level.
* Exposure to infrastructure-as-code tools like Terraform or Helm.
* Basic programming skills - enough to script, automate, and understand systems.
* A strong curiosity for how systems work under the hood.
* A mindset of learning and improvement - you’re eager to develop your skills quickly.
* Interest in building reliable systems that help others move faster.

### **Bonus Points**

* You’ve built or run your own infrastructure projects (e.g. self-hosting, home labs, media servers, etc.)
* Experience working with slightly larger systems or production environments
* Familiarity with networking, security, or observability concepts
* Experience with Kubernetes packaging (e.g. Helm charts)
* Background in software engineering or scripting-heavy roles

**Location**
------------


We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.

**How to Apply**
----------------


We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.


Our interview process consists of 4 stages:

* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineers
* Interview with our CTO & Co-Founder
* Home case and presentation at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch, a presentation and som pair programming to experience our our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.

**Benefits**
------------

* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 25 days/year of paid vacation
* Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag)
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.

**Culture at Tandem**
=====================

  

At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.


Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.


Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.


We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.  

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Junior Data Scientist
description:
Position Overview
  
The Junior Data Scientist is responsible for designing, developing, and deploying machine learning models and analytics solutions within a cloud environment. This role leverages statistical techniques and big data technologies to deliver actionable insights for data-informed decision-making, and scalable solutions to increase business capabilities.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
Design, develop, and deploy machine learning and statistical models to support predictive and prescriptive analytics across business processes.
  
Analyse large, complex datasets to uncover patterns, trends, and actionable insights that drive strategic decision-making.
  
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into data-driven solutions and integrate models into production systems.
  
Perform feature engineering, data preprocessing, and exploratory data analysis to ensure high quality inputs for modelling.
  
Evaluate and optimize model performance through hyperparameter tuning, validation techniques, and continuous monitoring.
  
Follow best practices for model lifecycle management, including versioning, retraining, and deployment in cloud environments.
  
Ensure data quality, integrity, and compliance with security standards throughout all analytical workflows.
  
Communicate findings and recommendations clearly to technical and non- technical stakeholders through reports, dashboards, and presentations
  
Stay current with emerging trends in machine learning, AI, and data science to continuously improve methodologies and tools.
  
Document processes, methodologies, and data models to promote transparency and knowledge sharing.
  
  

Requirements
  
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  
Strong communication skills, capable of explaining complex concepts to diverse audiences.
  
Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a rapidly evolving environment.
  
Attention to detail and commitment to data accuracy and quality.
  
Proactive, innovative mindset with a willingness to learn and adapt.
  
Strong organizational and time management skills.
  
Proven experience as a Data Scientist or similar role.
  
Proficiency in programming languages such as Python or Scala.
  
Expertise in machine learning frameworks and libraries (e.g., XGBoost).
  
Knowledge of statistical modelling, predictive analytics, and data visualization tools.
  
Experience with SQL and working with large-scale datasets.
  
Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
  
Understanding of data pipeline orchestration and ETL processes.
  
Experience with CI/CD pipelines using tools such as GitLab or GitHub
  
Knowledge of big data tools (e.g., Spark) and real-time analytics
  
Advanced degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, or related field.
  
Relevant certifications (e.g., AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty, Azure Data Scientist Associate).
  
The above duties provide a generic description of the Employee’s day to day responsibilities but should in no way be deemed to be an exhaustive list. Additional related, duties may be assigned by the Line Manager in line with business exigencies and continuity.
  
  

Why Work With Us?
  
At Silverspin, we take bold but thoughtful approaches to what we build and how we work. We act with confidence and responsibility, focusing on smart decisions, meaningful impact, and long-term success.
  
Joining us means being part of a team that values curiosity, ownership, and collaboration. We encourage people to challenge ideas, simplify complexity, and grow together - creating an environment where great work (and good energy) go hand in hand.
  
  

**We offer:**  

Competitive salary and benefits
  
Opportunities to learn, grow, and develop
  
A creative, collaborative team environment
  
  

Silverspin is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Sr Technical Manager
description:
Key Responsibilities
  
* Provide L3-level support for Entra ID and Azure Application Proxy–related issues.
* Troubleshoot complex authentication, Conditional Access, and SSO (SAML, OAuth, OpenID) issues.
* Manage Azure App Proxy connectors, application publishing, and certificate renewals.
* Administer and optimize Conditional Access, MFA, and Identity Protection policies.
* Support hybrid identity integrations using Azure AD Connect or Cloud Sync.
* Perform root cause analysis and implement permanent resolutions for recurring problems.
* Monitor service health, performance, and security posture using Azure Monitor / Sentinel.
* Handle change management activities (RFC creation, validation, and closure).
* Collaborate with network and security teams for dependencies such as DNS, firewalls, and certificates.
* Maintain technical documentation, runbooks, and conduct knowledge transfers for L1/L2 teams.


Required Skills
  
* Expertise in Microsoft Entra ID / Azure AD configuration and troubleshooting.
* Hands-on experience with Azure Application Proxy – publishing, connectors, and certificates.
* Strong knowledge of Conditional Access, MFA, and Hybrid Identity concepts.
* Proficiency in PowerShell scripting for automation and reporting.
* Understanding of ADFS, TLS/SSL, and reverse proxy configurations.
* Exposure to Azure Monitor, Microsoft Sentinel, or other SIEM tools.


Soft Skills
  
* Strong ownership and accountability for service uptime.
* Effective communication and cross-team collaboration.
company_description: We bring together the best of technology and our people to supercharge progress.

title: Support & Integration Specialist
description:
Are you passionate about systems, integrations, and logistics? Do you enjoy being at the intersection of IT, operations and business development – and want to contribute to smart, scalable solutions in a growing international company? Then this might be the role for you.
  
About the role
  
As a Support & Integration Specialist (SIS), you will be part of our IT/Systems team and play a key role in ensuring efficient, secure and well‑integrated system solutions across the organisation. Together with colleagues in IT and operations, you will lead and support integrations, optimize existing processes, and help develop new ones as our business grows.
  
Our core Transport Management System is CargoWise, and you will work closely with this platform, supporting users, improving integrations and enabling solutions that are critical for daily operations, customer experience and future growth.
  
  

Your mission
  
Your mission is to deliver robust and competitive system solutions that meet evolving market demands. By enabling smooth integrations for customers, terminals and other stakeholders, you help position WALLENIUS SOL as a reliable and forward‑leaning partner. As volumes increase and new ports, clients and integrations are added, your contribution will be essential in ensuring speed, quality and stability in our system landscape.
  
  

Key responsibilities
  
Be part of the implementation team for new and existing system integrations
  
Troubleshoot system and integration inquiries via our Helpdesk
  
Identify development or improvement needs in current integrations
  
Support and develop processes related to systems and integrations
  
Play an active role within the TMS development and support team
  
  

Key tasks
  
Implement new terminal and port integrations
  
Implement new client and warehouse integrations
  
Implement new system processes and applications
  
Maintain, troubleshoot and continuously optimize existing integrations and system processes
  
  

Your background
  
  

**Qualifications:**  

Experience within shipping and/or logistics (mandatory)
  
A university degree in IT and/or logistics – or equivalent experience considered relevant
  
A strong understanding of systems, integrations and data flows
  
Experience working in several parallel projects
  
Strong knowledge of Microsoft Office 365 (mandatory)
  
  

**Experience in the following areas is considered an advantage:**  

Working with Azure Cloud or similar platforms
  
Working with CargoWise or other Transport Management Systems
  
Working with BI tools such as Qlik or PowerBI
  
  

What we offer
  
At WALLENIUS SOL, you will be part of a company in rapid development, with short decision paths and a strong focus on collaboration. You will have the opportunity to influence system solutions that are business‑critical, contribute to process development, and grow together with an engaged international organization.
  
  

Practical Information
  
**Workplace:** Gothenburg
  
**Employment type:** Full time
  
**Start date:** As agreed
  
  

Interested?
  
We look forward to receiving your application.
  
Should you have any questions regarding the role, please feel free to contact us.

title: Nattreceptionist till hotell i Eskilstuna (sommarvikarie)
description:
Vi söker en ansvarstagande och serviceinriktad nattreceptionist till hotellverksamhet under sommaren mellan perioden juni-augusti. Tjänsten passar dig som trivs med nattarbete och som har förmåga att arbeta självständigt med stort ansvar.
  
  

Som nattreceptionist är du hotellets främsta kontaktperson under nattens timmar och ansvarar för att gästerna får ett professionellt bemötande samt en trygg och välfungerande vistelse.
  
  

**Arbetsuppgifter:**  

In- och utcheckning av gäster
  
Hantering av betalningar och kassaredovisning
  
Bokningshantering
  
Besvara telefon och e-post
  
Utföra administrativa arbetsuppgifter
  
Säkerställa att brand- och säkerhetsrutiner följs
  
Hantera gästärenden och oförutsedda situationer under natten
  
Arbetet sker nattetid samt helger.
  
  

Vem är du
  
  

Vi söker dig som är trygg i dig själv och trivs med att arbeta natt. Du är serviceinriktad, lösningsorienterad och har förmågan att behålla lugnet även i pressade situationer.
  
Du har förmågan att ge bra service
  
Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och fatta snabba beslut
  
Du är driven, lyhörd och flexibel
  
Lösningsorienterad och tar eget ansvar
  
Trygg med att arbeta ensam
  
Positiv till nattarbete
  
Bekväm med datorer och digitala system
  
  

Kvalifikationer
  
  

**För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har:**  

Erfarenhet från hotellbranschen, gärna som receptionist eller liknande roll
  
Alternativt erfarenhet från andra serviceyrken
  
Utbildning inom hotell och turism är meriterande
  
God datorvana och erfarenhet av digitala system
  
Meriterande kunskaper i bokningssystem såsom Mews, Opera Cloud, Hotsoft, HMS eller liknande
  
God kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift (ytterligare språk är meriterande
  
Du är ostraffad
  
  

Låter detta som rätt roll för dig?
  
  

Om du trivs i en nattlig miljö och har ett genuint intresse för service och ansvar är du varmt välkommen att skicka in din ansökan.
  
Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
  
Urval sker löpande.
  
  

Top Solution är ett entreprenadföretag inom hotell och nattreception.

title: Data Scientist
description:
Vi söker en Data Scientist till ett uppdrag där du arbetar med att driva datadrivna insikter för verksamhetsutveckling och strategiska beslut.
  
Du kommer att arbeta med hela kedjan från datainsamling och förberedelse till modellering, analys och visualisering. Rollen kräver både teknisk kompetens och förmåga att kommunicera insikter till affärsverksamheten.
  
  

**Vi söker dig som har:**  

Minst 5 års erfarenhet inom Data Science / Data Analytics
  
Stark erfarenhet av statistik, prediktiv analys och datamodellering
  
Erfarenhet av att arbeta med stora datamängder i komplexa miljöer
  
Erfarenhet av att bygga och optimera analysmodeller
  
  

**Teknisk kompetens:**  

Python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn) eller R
  
SQL på avancerad nivå
  
Power BI / Tableau / liknande BI-verktyg
  
Erfarenhet av cloud-plattformar (Azure, AWS eller GCP är meriterande)
  
Erfarenhet av data pipelines (ETL/ELT)

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description:
As a Site Reliability Engineer, you’ll join the development team behind Exoborne—an open-world tactical extraction shooter. You’ll work with modern technologies and practices to design, build, and operate the infrastructure that powers the game.
  
We’re expanding our team to further strengthen both our on-premise and cloud environments, ensuring performance, reliability, and scalability at every level.
  
We’re looking for someone who can clearly communicate complex technical concepts, takes pride in building high-quality systems, and thrives working independently. And just as importantly, you have a genuine passion for games.
  
Key Qualifications \* Comfortable working independently in Python or any major language. \* Experienced with building cloud services and distributed systems (example Docker/Kubernetes, etc.) \* Experience of Cloud service providers such as Google Cloud Platform, AWS, Azure. \* Infrastructure orchestration such as Terraform or Cloudformation. \* Configuration management and automation tools such as SaltStack or Ansible. \* Services and infrastructure monitoring tools such as Grafana, Prometheus, and the ELK stack. \* Enthusiastic for new technologies and growth. \* A true collaborative spirit - making sure communication works efficiently between disciplines.
  
  

Who we are
  
Sharkmob was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Malmö, Sweden. The studio develops AAA-quality games for PC and console, using the Unreal Engine to power its ambitions of taking multiplayer games to new heights.
  
We are currently working on Exoborne – a Sharkmob original game created in Malmö. Exoborne is a tactical, open-world extraction shooter set in a United States torn apart by apocalyptic forces of nature. Our first game Bloodhunt - a battle royale set in the Vampire: The Masquerade universe, was released in 2022.
  
At Sharkmob, we are committed to building an inclusive team that represents diverse backgrounds, perspectives, and skillsets – because we believe that helps us create great games. We welcome all candidates who are aligned with our core values of shared ownership, creating great games, and, last but not least – having fun! We hope you want to join us on our adventure and become a part of our crew. You can find more great perks of being a crew member. If you want to know more about Sharkmob and our projects, visit our homepage.
company_description: Sharkmob is a game development studio on an epic journey, and we want you to join us! Come explore new territory in the realm of AAA online gaming.

Du kommer att arbeta med modellutveckling, data engineering och implementation av AI-lösningar i befintliga system. Rollen kräver både teknisk djup och förståelse för hur AI används i verksamhetskritiska processer.

title: Data Scientist
description:
**Background**

We are building next-generation, customer-facing digital experiences powered by Generative AI. This role will be part of a high-impact product team focused on developing intelligent chatbot solutions that enhance user engagement and self-service capabilities.

You will work at the intersection of machine learning, large language models, and scalable system design to create cutting-edge AI-driven applications.

**Scope of Work**

The consultant will support the digital product team in designing and developing a customer-facing GenAI chatbot solution, contributing across architecture, development, and optimization of AI systems.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design and build **GenAI-powered chatbot solutions** for customer-facing applications
* Develop and implement **agentic AI frameworks** for autonomous and context-aware interactions
* Architect and optimize **LLM-based systems** for performance, scalability, and reliability
* Ensure **ML pipeline excellence**, including training, evaluation, deployment, and monitoring
* Collaborate with product, engineering, and data teams to deliver end-to-end AI solutions
* Contribute to **AI architecture design**, including model selection, orchestration, and integration
* Continuously improve model performance using prompt engineering, fine-tuning, and evaluation techniques

**Day-to-Day Tasks**

* Build and evolve **agentic frameworks** for chatbot systems
* Maintain and improve **machine learning pipelines and workflows**
* Design and implement **AI/ML architectures** aligned with product needs
* Work hands-on with LLMs for experimentation, testing, and deployment

**Required Skills & Experience**

* Strong experience with **Large Language Models (LLMs)** and GenAI applications
* Proficiency in **Python** and solid software engineering practices
* Hands-on experience in **AI/ML development**, including model integration and deployment
* Experience building **AI agents / autonomous systems**
* Strong understanding of **machine learning concepts and pipelines**
* Background in **Mathematics, Physics, Machine Learning, Data Science**, or similar quantitative fields
* Experience with modern AI tooling, frameworks, and cloud environments

**Top 3 Must-Have Skills**

* **Deep understanding of LLMs**
* **AI Agent / Agentic Framework Development**
* **Strong Python & AI Engineering capability**

title: Security Manager, Credit & Wealth – Tieto BankTech
description:
Solna, Sweden


* Full-time
* Consulting
* Hybrid
* Tieto Banktech

  
Job Description  

Tieto BankTech is the leading financial services software, and solutions partner in the Nordics, delivering modular, pre‑integrated Banking‑as‑a‑Service platforms and mission‑critical software for core banking, payments, credit, cards, fraud prevention, and wealth management. Our solutions operate in highly regulated, high‑availability environments where security, resilience, and compliance are non‑negotiable.


We are looking for an experienced Security Manager to take technical ownership of security management within our Credit and Wealth business unit, ensuring robust protection of our SaaS platforms, product development environments, and operational services.


This role is hands‑on and technical in nature, combining security leadership with deep involvement in incident response, risk management, and regulatory compliance. You will work closely with BankTech Security, product engineering, cloud and infrastructure teams, and other key control functions.

**As Security Manager, you will:**

**Security Operations & Incident Response**

* Act as Lead Security Incident Manager for Product Development and SaaS / Managed Services
* Own and drive security incident response processes, including detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and post‑incident analysis
* Coordinate technical resolution with product owners, architects, engineering teams, site reliability / operations, and service managers
* Ensure proper root cause analysis (RCA), corrective actions, and preventive controls are identified and implemented
* Maintain accurate and complete incident documentation in line with audit and regulatory expectations

**Security Governance & Risk Management**


Own and evolve the security framework for the business unit, covering:

* Information security
* Cloud and application security
* Product development security (SDLC / DevSecOps)
* Physical and operational security
* Business continuity and resilience
* Perform risk assessments and threat analysis across systems, services, and processes
* Translate risk findings into concrete technical and procedural controls
* Support and contribute to BCP/DR planning, technical resilience testing, and operational continuity activities

**Compliance & Assurance**


Develop, maintain, and enforce security policies, procedures, and technical controls aligned with:

* ISO 27001 / ISMS
* SOC 1 / SOC 2
* Financial services regulatory requirements
* Actively support audits, assessments, and certifications, including evidence collection and remediation tracking
* Ensure ongoing compliance with privacy and security legislation, including:
	+ GDPR
	+ NIS2
	+ DORA
	+ EU AI Act
* Serve as the security authority within the business unit toward Group Security, auditors, regulators, and internal control functions

**Security Enablement**

* Provide technical security guidance to product development, platform, and operations teams
* Embed security requirements into architecture decisions, technical designs, and delivery processes
* Drive security awareness and training, with a focus on secure development and operational practices
* Act as the primary security escalation and advisory contact for the business unit

**Who you are**


You are a senior security professional with strong technical depth, credibility with SW engineers, and the ability to operate confidently in a regulated SaaS and financial services environment.


Experience & Background

* 8–10+ years of experience in security roles within software development and SaaS / managed service environments
* Strong hands‑on experience with:
	+ Security incident handling and forensics collaboration
	+ Risk assessment and control design
	+ Security governance in large, complex organizations
* Experience working in or close to financial services, banking, or other regulated industries

**Technical & Professional Skills**

* Solid understanding of application development, platforms, and cloud security concepts
* Working knowledge of secure SDLC / DevSecOps practices
* Proven experience with standards and frameworks such as:
	+ ISO 27001
	+ SOC 1 / SOC 2
	+ ISO 9001 / 14001 (understanding of integrated management systems)
* Demonstrated experience implementing and maintaining compliance programs and certifications
* Strong documentation skills and ability to produce audit‑grade material
* Engineering degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Computer Security, or equivalent

**Personal Profile**

* Clear, structured communicator with strong spoken and written English
* Confident advisor to engineers, product managers, and senior stakeholders
* Able to balance security, availability, and business continuity
* Customer facing with a good sense business acumen

 **What we offer**

* A **technically challenging security manager role** in a highly regulated, mission‑critical SaaS environment
* Direct influence on the security posture of products used by leading financial institutions
* Participation in a **major transformation journey** at Tieto BankTech
* Work across **global and local markets**
* A collaborative culture with skilled engineers and security professionals
* Health and wellness programs
* Ongoing professional development and learning

 **How to apply?**


Interviews will be held continuously, so we encourage you to apply today! For more information or questions, please contact Talent Acquisition team recruitmentinbanking@tieto.com Tieto embraces diversity wholeheartedly, extending a warm invitation to applicants from every gender, age group, ability, ethnicity, orientation, belief system, and background. Step into the forefront of the digital banking revolution alongside Tieto BankTech, where you can contribute to unlocking the full potential of businesses and societies, while also realizing your own.


As part of our recruitment process, we validate identity and conduct background checks to ensure a secure hiring experience.


Application deadline: 15th of May.

  

Additional Information  

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.


Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)


  
**We are Tieto - A leading software and technology consulting company**


We provide customers across different industries with mission-critical solutions through our specialized software businesses Tieto Caretech, Tieto Banktech and Tieto Indtech as well as Tieto Tech Consulting business.


Our around 14 000 talented vertical software, design, cloud and AI experts are dedicated to empowering our customers to succeed and innovate with latest technology.


Tieto’s annual revenue is approximately EUR 2 billion. The company’s shares are listed on the NASDAQ exchange in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.
company_description: Join our team to create purposeful technology that reinvents the world. For good.

title: Receptionschef
description:
**Om oss**



Hotel J är en wellness-destination formad av naturen belägen mellan Stockholm och Skärgården.



Bara ett stenkast från stadens puls, men ändå avskilt från vardagens brus, väntar Hotel J. En året-runt-destination för rekreation, inspiration och meningsfulla möten. Här infinner sig känslan av att komma hem, varje gång. Omgiven av havet och naturens stillsamma kraft är J en plats att återvända till, om och om igen.



Utforska vattnets renande element genom ett uppfriskande havsbad från klipporna eller från vår egen brygga. Låt värmen i bastun ta vid, eller boka en privat bastuceremoni i Panoramabastun, med vidsträckt utsikt över horisonten och det öppna havet.



Hotel J erbjuder ett omsorgsfullt kurerat utbud av wellness-upplevelser, från kallbad och basturitualer till guidade örtvandringar, breathwork och yoga. För den som önskar finns även möjlighet att boka privata sessioner, när som helst under veckan.


*“Vår vision är att vara en självklar destination för meningsfulla möten. Vi vill att våra gäster ska känna sig mer i kontakt med både naturen och sig själva, och lämna oss med en starkare känsla av välmående än när de kom”*, säger Hotel J:s vd Alla Sokolova.

  


**Om rollen**



Som receptionschef lyfter du och etablerar en högre service nivå, tar ansvar för personal i receptionen och driver fram förändringen och etableringen av J som destination hotel. Ditt ansvarsområde i den dagliga driften omfamnar bland annat följande uppgifter;


* Nå merförsäljnings mål och budget genom att leverera den bästa servicen till våra gäster, i form av uppgradering, room service, wellness aktiveringar/behandlingar, retail och sälj i vardagsrummet.
* Daglig schemaansvar, bemanning och personalansvar
* Koordinera med andra avdelningar i hotellet med målet att gästerna ska få den bästa upplevelsen under dess vistelse
* Ansvar för gästnöjdhet , kommunikation till gäster hela leden innan , i deras vistelse och efter.
* Service av VIP / Ambassadörer

 **Vi förväntar oss att;**


* Du har goda ledaregenskaper och gillar att utveckla andra
* Du är driven, passionerad, självständig, och lösningsorienterad
* Du är ansvarsfullt och ställer upp där det behövs
* Du älskar service och strävar efter 100% gästnöjdhet
* Du är bra på klagomålshantering och kan vända svåra situationer till ett positivt slut
* Du gillar att ha roligt på jobbet och tycker det är viktigt att sprida en positiv atmosfär
* Du har ett öga för detaljer
* Du är flytande i både tal och skrift i svenska och engelska, att kunna andra språk är förmånligt
* Det är meriterande om du redan har kunskap av Opera eller Opera Cloud


Närvaro är A och O för att skapa trygghet och bibehålla en hög nivå av kunskap. Arbetstiden är dynamisk och varierar mellan kvällar, helger och dagtid.

  


**Vi söker heltids medarbetare. Välkommen med din ansökan fram tills 26.04**

title: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
description:
Om Avidity
  
Avidity är ett specialiserat mjukvaruutvecklingsföretag med kontor i Berlin, Stockholm och Porto Alegre i Brasilien. Sedan 2012 har vi hjälpt IT-företag att bygga och driva tillförlitliga mjukvarusystem.
  
Våra kunder är främst tech-företag inom branscher som edtech, digital signage, transport och fintech. Vi stödjer dem med specialiserad expertis, går in i deras team för att stärka pågående projekt eller tar fullt ansvar för att leverera och driva kompletta system.
  
Parallellt med mjukvaruutveckling designar och driver vi den infrastruktur som kör våra kunders applikationer. Aviditys infrastructure engineers arbetar nära utvecklare för att bygga säkra, skalbara och tillförlitliga miljöer för moderna cloud-baserade applikationer.
  
Rollen
  
Vi söker en Cloud Infrastructure Engineer som kan hjälpa till att designa, driva och kontinuerligt förbättra de miljöer som kör våra applikationer och våra kunders applikationer.
  
I denna roll kommer du att arbeta över hela livscykeln för vår infrastruktur: designa och implementera miljöer, underhålla och övervaka produktionssystem samt förbättra utvecklarflöden såsom deployment och CI/CD pipelines. Vi arbetar nära utvecklingsteam för att säkerställa att applikationer körs tillförlitligt, säkert och effektivt i produktion.
  
I denna roll kommer du att arbeta med Linux-baserade system och modern infrastructure tooling för att bygga och driva containeriserade applikationer och cloud-miljöer. Du kommer att hjälpa till att automatisera infrastruktur, förbättra observability och operativa processer samt säkerställa att våra system uppfyller höga krav på tillförlitlighet och säkerhet.
  
Du kommer att ha betydande inflytande över hur infrastrukturen designas och drivs för de system du arbetar med.
  
**Nyckelprojekt:** Säker infrastruktur för finanssektorn
  
Som en del av denna roll kommer du att arbeta med en plattform som utvecklats för en kund inom finanssektorn. Systemet levereras som en komplett tjänst, där vi ansvarar för både applikationen och infrastrukturen den körs på.
  
Plattformen verkar i en starkt reglerad miljö och måste uppfylla strikta krav på säkerhet och efterlevnad av finansiella regelverk. Den integrerar också med externa myndigheter och tillsynssystem, vilket ställer ytterligare krav på operativ tillförlitlighet och spårbarhet.
  
Du kommer att bidra till utveckling och drift av den cloud-infrastruktur som stödjer plattformen, och hjälpa till att säkerställa att den körs i en kontrollerad och tillförlitlig miljö som lämpar sig för kritiska finansiella tjänster.
  
Detta projekt erbjuder möjligheten att arbeta med infrastruktur där säkerhet och ansvarstagande är grundläggande designprinciper snarare än tillägg i efterhand. Plattformen är byggd för långsiktig stabilitet och förutsägbara operationer i ett sammanhang där system måste tåla både operativa krav och extern granskning.
  
Vad du kommer att få göra
  
Konfigurera, administrera och automatisera Linux-baserad infrastruktur
  
Bygga och underhålla automatiserade deployment- och integrationspipelines
  
Övervaka, felsöka och kontinuerligt förbättra produktionssystem
  
Designa och driva high-availability-infrastruktur, inklusive failover mellan datacenter
  
Implementera infrastructure automation och configuration management
  
Säkerställa starka säkerhetsrutiner, inklusive secrets management, access control och säker systemkonfiguration
  
Designa och underhålla strategier för backup och disaster recovery
  
Arbeta nära utvecklare för att diagnostisera och lösa problem i produktionsmiljöer
  
  

Kärnteknologier
  
Kubernetes
  
OpenStack
  
Docker
  
Ansible
  
Git
  
CI/CD-system såsom GitHub Actions eller Jenkins
  
Nginx
  
Let’s Encrypt
  
PostgreSQL
  
Microsoft SQL Server
  
Cloud-plattformar såsom AWS, GCP eller Azure
  
  

För att lyckas i denna roll tror vi att du
  
Har stark Linux-kunskap och är bekväm med att driva produktionssystem
  
Har erfarenhet av att designa och driva infrastruktur för moderna applikationer
  
Är bekant med container orchestration-plattformar såsom Kubernetes
  
Har erfarenhet av OpenStack-miljöer (meriterande)
  
Tycker om att automatisera infrastruktur och operativa processer
  
Har en stark medvetenhet om security best practices inom infrastruktur och drift
  
Är bekväm med att arbeta med cloud-plattformar, oavsett leverantör
  
Förstår vikten av tillförlitlighet, redundans och failover i produktionsmiljöer
  
Samarbetar väl med utvecklare och tycker om att tillsammans lösa operativa utmaningar
  
Är flytande i engelska
  
  

Att arbeta på Avidity
  
På Avidity kommer du att arbeta nära utvecklare och infrastrukturspecialister på våra kontor i Berlin, Stockholm och Porto Alegre. Vi värdesätter samarbete, kunskapsdelning och att ta ansvar för de system vi bygger och driver.
  
Vi erbjuder en flexibel arbetsmiljö som kombinerar remote work med tid på vårt kontor i Stockholm. Våra ingenjörer är vana vid att arbeta över geografiska platser och tidszoner, och vi lägger stor vikt vid tydlig kommunikation och förtroende.
  
Vi söker någon som vill växa tillsammans med Avidity i Sverige och bidra till att bygga tillförlitlig infrastruktur för långsiktiga kundprojekt. Många av våra uppdrag är långvariga, vilket gör att vi kan ta verkligt ansvar för de system vi designar och driver.

title: Lead Infrastructure Engineer
description:
**Do you want to be part of a fast growing scale-up working with some of the world's most well-known brands and agencies to digitise their way of working? Would you like to own and shape the infrastructure behind a product trusted by global names? Join our team!**


We're looking for a Lead Infrastructure Engineer to join our Engineering department in Malmö. You'll take ownership of our cloud-based infrastructure and help us build a solid foundation for multi-region growth, all while keeping things simple, deliberate, and done right.

#### **About this role**


This is a hands-on, senior individual contributor role. You'll report directly to the engineering leadership team and have real ownership over our infrastructure. We're a small, opinionated team that values doing things correctly over doing them fast. We want someone who shares that mindset: someone who thinks carefully, communicates clearly, and takes pride in building things that last.

#### **Key Responsibilities**

* Own and maintain our Kubernetes clusters running on AWS (EKS), including monitoring, patching, and continuous improvement
* Architect and implement multi-region capabilities to support our growing global customer base
* Manage and improve our deployment pipelines across development and production environments
* Work with managed services including MongoDB, Elasticsearch, and Redis
* Collaborate closely with our engineering team on infrastructure decisions, balancing speed with long-term sustainability
* Identify and drive improvements to reliability, security, and operational efficiency across our platform

#### **Required Skills & Attributes**

* Significant hands-on experience with Kubernetes in production
* Strong understanding of AWS services, networking, and cloud architecture
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform or similar)
* Comfortable working independently and owning decisions, while keeping stakeholders in the loop
* You prefer doing things right over doing things fast, and you can articulate the trade-offs
* Strong communication skills and a collaborative mindset

#### **Preferred Background**

* Experience with multi-region or multi-tenant architectures
* Familiarity with managed database services
* Experience in a SaaS or scale-up environment
* Exposure to cost optimization and resource planning in AWS

#### **Educational Requirements**


No specific degree required. We care about what you can do, not what's on your diploma. Relevant experience and a strong track record matter most.

#### **Key Impact**


As our Lead Infrastructure Engineer, you'll directly shape how Camphouse scales globally. You'll be the person who ensures our platform is reliable, secure, and ready to grow, giving our engineering team confidence to ship features and our customers confidence in the product. This is a role where your decisions will have a lasting impact on the company's technical foundation.

#### **We offer**

* Competitive salary matching the demands of the role
* Office in central Malmö with a fun and casual engineering culture
* Thrive in a vibrant office setting, with the added flexibility of occasional remote work
* A clear path for growth in a globally expanding tech company
* International working environment with colleagues across multiple countries
* A company culture dedicated to fast growth, keeping things simple, high ambitions, and good colleagueship
* Great team spirit and ambitious colleagues to work with

#### **About us**


Camphouse is a fast-growing SaaS company with a global customer base, helping local and global brands with their media management. Customers such as H&M, Heineken, L’Oréal Groupe and Zalando trust Camphouse for their marketing planning and performance management.

**Ready to be a part of this journey?**

**Lovely! The application is as easy as it can be. Write a few words about yourself and why you'd be the right person for this role. We review applications on an ongoing basis, so don't wait too long!**
company_description: Camphouse (former Mediatool) is a cloud-based remote marketing platform that helps teams to plan, execute, track & optimise media and marketing campaigns.

title: Ekonom till leverantörsreskontra
description:
*At Aceve, we empower the builders of society and transform the construction and skilled trades industry—one of the least digitalized sectors in Europe. As a united SaaS powerhouse, we bring together leading products into a single pioneering platform dedicated to making a difference.*  

  

*With over 900 passionate employees and more than €100 million in revenue, we blend tradition and innovation to reshape our industry’s future. Our cloud-based, AI-driven software solutions deliver actionable insights and drive improvements for construction companies and skilled tradespeople, enhancing project management, installations, maintenance, and services.*  

  

*On our ambitious growth journey, we are committed to winning together and accelerating digital transformation. With Aceve’s tools, our customers can boost their performance, productivity, and profitability, ensuring they thrive in a rapidly changing landscape.*  

  

*Join us in revolutionizing the industry and building a brighter future together!*  

  

**Om rollen**


Som Ekonom med ansvar för leverantörsreskontra spelar du en nyckelroll i att hålla våra betalningsflöden smidiga och effektiva. Rollen är placerad på vårt kontor i Linköping och är central för vår ekonomiavdelning – här blir du den interna experten som stöttar kollegor, hanterar leverantörsdialog och säkerställer att inget faller mellan stolarna. Vi är en organisation som aktivt arbetar med AI och automatisering för att modernisera ekonomiflöden, och du kommer att vara en del av den resan.

**Dina ansvarsområden**


Du tar ägarskap över leverantörsflödena och arbetar brett – från fakturahantering och utläggsredovisning till analys, intern rådgivning och aktivt bidragande till hur vi använder AI i våra ekonomiprocesser.

* Hantera leverantörsfakturor i Medius AP Automation: tolka, verifiera, kontera och skicka för attest
* Följa upp fakturor i godkännandeflöden och säkerställa att inget faller mellan stolarna
* Stämma av leverantörsreskontran mot saldon i huvudboken
* Hantera utläggsredovisning och säkerställa korrekt och effektiv hantering av anställdas utlägg
* Bidra till utvecklingen av AI-stödda arbetsflöden inom leverantörsreskontra och fakturahantering
* Bearbeta leverantörspåminnelser och hålla dialogen professionell och konstruktiv
* Förbereda analyser och rapporter kring leverantörsskulder
* Säkerställa att interna kontroller och policyer följs
* Besvara frågor från leverantörer om fakturor och betalningar
* Vara intern support i frågor kring attester och leverantörsfakturor

 **Vi söker dig som**

* Har 1–3 års erfarenhet inom leverantörsreskontra
* Har en eftergymnasial utbildning inom ekonomi eller redovisning
* Har erfarenhet från arbete på en ekonomiavdelning
* Är systemintresserad och har gärna erfarenhet av Medius AP Automation
* Är nyfiken på AI och hur det kan effektivisera ekonomiprocesser
* Talar och skriver flytande svenska och engelska
* Är noggrann, strukturerad och gillar att ha full koll på detaljer
* Trivs med att ge service och samarbeta, både internt och externt

**Bonuspoäng**

* Erfarenhet av utläggshanteringssystem eller liknande verktyg för utläggsredovisning
* Erfarenhet av AI-verktyg eller automatiserade flöden inom ekonomi eller AP-processer

 **Not ticking every box?** No worries! We value potential and drive, so apply anyway or connect with us- you might be just what we're looking for in our growing organisation! Join Aceve and take your expertise to the next level, together we are redefining what’s possible in craft and construction solutions!

 *Aceve is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Our selection process is conducted continuously and without discrimination, ensuring an equal opportunity for all candidates.*

title: Junior Data Scientist
description:
### **Position Overview**


The Junior Data Scientist is responsible for designing, developing, and deploying machine learning models and analytics solutions within a cloud environment. This role leverages statistical techniques and big data technologies to deliver actionable insights for data-informed decision-making, and scalable solutions to increase business capabilities.

### **Key Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, and deploy machine learning and statistical models to support predictive and prescriptive analytics across business processes.
* Analyse large, complex datasets to uncover patterns, trends, and actionable insights that drive strategic decision-making.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into data-driven solutions and integrate models into production systems.
* Perform feature engineering, data preprocessing, and exploratory data analysis to ensure high quality inputs for modelling.
* Evaluate and optimize model performance through hyperparameter tuning, validation techniques, and continuous monitoring.
* Follow best practices for model lifecycle management, including versioning, retraining, and deployment in cloud environments.
* Ensure data quality, integrity, and compliance with security standards throughout all analytical workflows.
* Communicate findings and recommendations clearly to technical and non- technical stakeholders through reports, dashboards, and presentations
* Stay current with emerging trends in machine learning, AI, and data science to continuously improve methodologies and tools.
* Document processes, methodologies, and data models to promote transparency and knowledge sharing.

### **Requirements**

* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Strong communication skills, capable of explaining complex concepts to diverse audiences.  

Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a rapidly evolving environment.
* Attention to detail and commitment to data accuracy and quality.
* Proactive, innovative mindset with a willingness to learn and adapt.
* Strong organizational and time management skills.
* Proven experience as a Data Scientist or similar role.
* Proficiency in programming languages such as Python or Scala.
* Expertise in machine learning frameworks and libraries (e.g., XGBoost).
* Knowledge of statistical modelling, predictive analytics, and data visualization tools.
* Experience with SQL and working with large-scale datasets.
* Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
* Understanding of data pipeline orchestration and ETL processes.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines using tools such as GitLab or GitHub
* Knowledge of big data tools (e.g., Spark) and real-time analytics
* Advanced degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, or related field.
* Relevant certifications (e.g., AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty, Azure Data Scientist Associate).

 *The above duties provide a generic description of the Employee’s day to day responsibilities but should in no way be deemed to be an exhaustive list. Additional related, duties may be assigned by the Line Manager in line with business exigencies and continuity.*

### **Why Work With Us?**


At Silverspin, we take bold but thoughtful approaches to what we build and how we work. We act with confidence and responsibility, focusing on smart decisions, meaningful impact, and long-term success.


Joining us means being part of a team that values curiosity, ownership, and collaboration. We encourage people to challenge ideas, simplify complexity, and grow together - creating an environment where great work (and good energy) go hand in hand.


We offer:

* Competitive salary and benefits
* Opportunities to learn, grow, and develop
* A creative, collaborative team environment


Silverspin is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Technical Process Safety Specialist
description:
Build the Future of Technology with Professional Galaxy AB


Join a network of talented engineers, developers, cloud specialists, and AI innovators working on impactful projects across Sweden and Europe. At Professional Galaxy AB, we connect top tech talent with companies driving digital transformation in areas like cloud computing, software engineering, data, cybersecurity, and artificial intelligence.


Explore exciting opportunities and grow your career while working with cutting-edge technologies and forward-thinking teams.


We are looking for a **Technical Process Safety Specialist**


As a Technical Process Safety Specialist, your role is critical in supporting the safe and compliant design and operation of the project’s assets. You contribute with expertise to ensure that all facilities are designed with a strong focus on safety, minimizing risks to staff, contractors, and the surrounding community. This involves close collaboration with design & engineering consultants, contractors, and equipment vendors to review and validate safety aspects of the design. You will contribute to the development and application of safety standards for the project, aligned with applicable regulatory requirements and industry best practices.


This position is based in Stockholm. The candidate should be flexible to work and travel to project sites as required.

**Responsibilities:**  

* Supporting Design Safety: Contribute to ensuring that the design of all project facilities prioritizes safety and minimizes risks. This includes reviewing and validating safety aspects together with engineering contractors and equipment vendors.
* Applying Safety Standards: Support the development, interpretation, and implementation of safety standards based on regulatory requirements and industry best practices. Ensure that these standards are consistently applied across the project.
* Regulatory Requirements Analysis: Collaborate with regulatory bodies and third-party specialists to identify and understand relevant regulatory requirements. Stay updated on applicable regulations and support interpretation of their impact on the project.
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with engineering teams, contractors, vendors, and regulatory bodies to ensure alignment on safety requirements. Contribute to effective communication of safety-related information and support resolution of compliance-related questions.
* Supporting Compliance Activities: Contribute to ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements and safety standards by participating in monitoring, reviews, inspections, and audits as needed.

By contributing with technical expertise in these areas, you support the delivery of a safe and legally compliant asset that protects the well-being of workers and the surrounding community.

**Qualifications:**  

* Engineering degree, MSc, in a relevant discipline, with preference to Chemical Engineering background
* At least ten years’ experience in large-scale industrial projects (50 MUSD+) and/or site experience (steel mill, mining, paper mill, utilities generation, LNG, Hydrogen, Oil & Gas, petrochemicals, refinery etc.), with a minimum of five years in a technical process safety-related role
* Experience in HAZID, HAZOP, LOPA, SIL, QRA, Risk Assessments, Functional Safety, BAT, Occupational Safety, Hazards, Fire Safety, ATEX, Hazardous Area Classification and Effects Management
* Additional experience of Noise Study, Consequence Analysis, Action Error Analysis, Interface Assessment, Machine Safety will be an advantage
* Experience with hydrogen systems / LNG / metal industry in major projects is a strong advantage
* Knowledge of relevant Swedish / European / EU / international standards, laws, and regulations related to technical process safety and industrial safety is required
* Knowledge of relevant permitting systems and consent-to-operate processes for major industrial plants is required
* **Swedish is mandatory**
**Assignment Period:**  

* Start: 2026-04-20
* End: 2026-12-31
**Application Deadline:** 2026-04-12

**How to Apply:**  

Are you the right person for this assignment, or do you want to recommend a strong candidate?


Please apply directly via the Professional Galaxy AB portal with:  

* Your updated CV
* Your availability to start
* A motivation statement describing why you are suitable for this role, referencing previous consulting assignments, education, and personal qualities

Please note: Applications via email will not be accepted. All applications must be submitted through the portal to be valid.

title: Data Engineering Consultant (Mid-level)
description:
We are the leading marketing and sales transformation partner in the Nordics! We are +100 colleagues located at our offices in Helsinki, Stockholm & Munich. We have more than fifteen years of experience in data-driven marketing and sales across B2C & B2B industries.


Our vision is to become the leading actionable marketing data-asset provider in Europe. We believe that to survive, companies will have to invest in capabilities related to intelligence & AI, customer experience orchestration and change management. Our mission is to foster customer-centric organisations equipped to grow and face the future, our future growth will be heavily driven by applying smart data and analytics for our clients.

**The Team**


In today's rapidly evolving market, companies need to invest in their data capabilities to deliver content and information that perfectly matches your needs when you need it. This is where we come in as consultants. We utilise cutting-edge technologies from leading cloud providers combined with machine learning to build scalable, future-proof data solutions.


As a member of our Stockholm team, you'll play a crucial role in designing and developing various data processing solutions that serve as the backbone for data-driven and personalised customer experiences. At Avaus, you'll discover a collaborative environment that encourages personal responsibility and freedom, where your problem-solving skills and eagerness to learn new technologies will thrive. We value individuals who take ownership, drive initiatives, and enjoy close collaboration and mutual learning.

 **The role**  

As a Data Engineer Consultant at Avaus, you'll be part of multidisciplinary client teams, likely in an Agile environment. Your role will involve direct interaction with clients' business and technical stakeholders to understand the intricacies of complex data solutions. Your core responsibilities include designing and developing data processing solutions using various cloud vendors' services.


You'll also likely engage in the following:

* Contribution to feature development from inception to delivery for our clients
* Design and development of data solutions using leading cloud platforms
* ETL and data analysis for providing valuable insights to our clients
* Advice clients on best practices and way forward
* Support with technical expertise in sales processes, by defining and presenting solutions
* Close collaboration with colleagues in data science, marketing automation, and strategy.

 **Who are you?**  

We are seeking a passionate individual who thrives in the world of technology and data. You enjoy analyzing data and translating it into actionable insights. Spotting business opportunities in data comes naturally to you. Your colleagues describe you as a team player, and you excel in building valuable relationships. Ownership is something you value, and you want to be part of our journey. In addition to your personality, we'd also like you to possess:


A Bachelor's Degree in computer science, mathematics, or physics, or a few years of relevant work experience

* Proficiency in one or more programming languages like Python, TypeScript or Java
* Experience working with Cloud platforms like GCP or Azure
* Proficiency in SQL and data modelling
* Experience in report and dashboard development
* Fluent in English, and Swedish.

 **Practical Information**


This is a permanent position with a 6 months’ probation period, based at our Stockholm Office. Starting date as soon as possible or by agreement. You will report to Ellen Lübeck, Head of Delivery and be part of the Data & Analytics team.


Already feel like one of us? Send your applications in English as soon as possible. This will be an ongoing recruitment and timing will be adapted to our client project needs. Due to GDPR, we only accept applications through our career page.


We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Applikationskonsult (SAP) – Sundsvall & Umeå
description:
*Implema är en av Sveriges ledande specialister på SAP och Microsoft Dynamics. Med över 25 års erfarenhet och 300 medarbetare på 10 orter runtom i Sverige hjälper vi företag att digitalisera och optimera sina affärsprocesser.*


Implema fortsätter att växa i norra Sverige! Hos Implema kombinerar du affärskritiska SAP‑projekt med ett hållbart arbetsliv i Norrland, oavsett om du tar klivet från key user till konsult eller redan är en etablerad SAP‑konsult. Är du en trygg och konsultativ rådgivare som trivs i team och driver lösningar framåt? Då kan detta vara rollen för dig!

#### **Om rollen**


Vi söker både dig som är erfaren key user och vill ta klivet över till applikations‑ och konsultrollen, och dig som redan idag arbetar som SAP‑ eller applikationskonsult och vill fortsätta utvecklas hos en ledande SAP‑partner.


Oavsett var du befinner dig i din resa erbjuder vi en tydlig utvecklingsväg där du arbetar affärsnära i SAP‑projekt, i starka team och med stöd av erfarna kollegor. Rollen kombinerar implementation, konfiguration, arkitektur och förvaltning, med möjlighet att successivt ta större ansvar – tekniskt, affärsmässigt och rådgivande.

 ***Kompetensutvecklingsspåret - för dig som kommer från användarsida***

* Ta steget från verksamhetsroll/keyuser-roll till SAP‑konsult.
* Mentorskap och teamleverans i skarpa kundprojekt.
* Kompetensutveckling inom SAP och konsultrollen.
* Möjlighet att växa i takt med din trygghet och erfarenhet.
 ***För dig som redan är etablerad SAP‑konsult/applikation konsult***

* Fördjupa och bredda din SAP‑kompetens.
* Utvecklas mot roller som expertkonsult, arkitekt eller projektledare.
* Arbeta i mer komplexa implementationer och transformationer.
* Kombinera långsiktiga uppdrag med varierande teamleveranser.
#### **Är du vår nya kollega?**

* Minst 3 års erfarenhet som SAP‑konsult eller key user.
* God förståelse för SAP och verksamhetsprocesser (ekonomi/finans- eller logistikprocesser)
* Erfarenhet av projekt är meriterande.
* Skriver och uttrycker dig obehindrat på flytande svenska och engelska.
* För dig som vill flytta tillbaka till Norrland – eller redan är här och redo för nästa steg.

#### **Implema erbjuder dig**

* En strategisk och inflytelserik roll i spännande projekt.
* Möjlighet att arbeta med den senaste SAP-tekniken (SAP S/4HANA on-prem, SAP Cloud ERP och SAP Cloud ERP Private)
* Kompetensutveckling och certifieringar.
* Konkurrenskraftig lön och förmåner.
* Möjlighet till hybridarbete.
* Flexibelt arbetssätt och god balans mellan arbete och fritid.

Vi tror på ett arbetsklimat där kunskap delas, initiativ uppmuntras och varje medarbetare får utvecklas – både professionellt och personligt. Med höga ambitioner och högt i tak skapar vi en miljö där det är lätt att trivas. För oss är det viktigt med work-life-balance, och vi värnar om en trygg arbetsmiljö där du mår bra och känner dig sedd. **Marknadsmässiga villkor och förmåner som stödjer dig.**

  

Utöver konkurrenskraftig lön erbjuder vi en flexibel hybridarbetsmodell, trygga pensions- och försäkringslösningar samt friskvårdsbidrag. Dessutom bjuder vi in till sociala aktiviteter som fritidsklubbar, after work, kickoff, skidresor och konferensresor.

title: Frilansare inom Data? Jobba med oss på Devoteam Göteborg!
description:
- **Dig vill vi samarbeta med!**  

Vi letar efter erfarna underkonsulter inom Data och som vill bygga morgondagens digitala lösningar tillsammans med oss. Vi sitter i Malmö, Helsingborg, Halmstad, Göteborg och Stockholm och jobbar med några av regionens mest spännande bolag.
  

  

**Mer än bara ett företag, vi vill vara en partner i din framgång!**  

25 års global erfarenhet med över 10 000 medarbetare i 20 länder är vi en ledande AWS, Azure, Snowflake och Google Cloud-partner som bidrar med expertis och innovation i varje projekt. Devoteam Göteborgs fokus ligger främst på att hjälpa nordiska företag att ta tillvara på sin data genom mjukvara, moderna dataplattformar, avancerad analys och AI-drivna lösningar.  

  



**Vi söker dig som är expert inom rollerna:**


	* Data Engineer
	* Data Analyst
	* Data Scientist(Ett extra plus är om du har erfarenhet inom Snowflake)  

  



**Varför Devoteam?**

Hos oss får du tillgång till tunga uppdrag, ett starkt tekniskt community (vi älskar våra Creative Days!) och ett brett nätverk av innovativa kunder.
  

  

Process: För denna tjänst är ett godkänt utdrag ur belastningsregistret en förutsättning för anställning.


Nyfiken? Registrera din profil så hör vi av oss när vi har ett uppdrag som matchar din kompetens.
company_description: Devoteam is a leading consulting firm focused on digital strategy, tech platforms, cybersecurity and business transformation.

Process: För denna tjänst är ett godkänt utdrag ur belastningsregistret en förutsättning för anställning.


Nyfiken? Registrera din profil så hör vi av oss när vi har ett uppdrag som matchar din kompetens.

description:

Vi letar efter erfarna underkonsulter inom Cloud, Data Cyber och AI, som vill bygga morgondagens digitala lösningar tillsammans med oss. Vi sitter i Malmö och Halmstad och jobbar med några av regionens mest spännande bolag.
